* Have experience building and scaling modern web applications
* Are comfortable working with state management and caching strategies
* Write efficient, accessible, and maintainable code
* Collaborate effectively and communicate clearly across teams
* Have a degree in Computer Science or equivalent practical experience
* You are drawn to Intric’s mission to bring secure, sovereign, and easy-to-use AI to Europe’s most critical institutions.


**Must-Haves**
* Solid experience with modern JavaScript frameworks
* Strong understanding of frontend architecture and performance optimization
* Experience working in product-focused, collaborative environments
* Ability to take ownership of features from idea to production
* Professional fluency in English


**Bonus**
* Experience with Svelte or SvelteKit
* Experience with Tailwind CSS
* Familiarity with developer tooling and internal workflow optimization


**Why Join Intric**
* Build technology with real societal impact
* Join at a pivotal growth stage and influence both product and technical direction
* Work in a trust-based, flexible environment with high ownership
* Be part of a fast-moving team that values pragmatic decisions over rigid frameworks
* Shape the frontend foundation of a secure AI platform scaling across Europe


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary and stock options
* 25 days of paid vacation
* Wellness allowance
* Rapid career development in a fast-growing AI company


**Culture at Intric**
 At Intric, we build secure AI solutions for organizations that cannot afford to get it wrong. We operate in environments where quality, responsibility, and long-term trust are essential.
   

  

 We value ownership and high standards. You are expected to take initiative, think critically, and contribute beyond your immediate scope when needed. Collaboration is key, but so is independent execution.
   

  

 We move fast, but we prioritize doing things properly. As we expand across Europe, every team member plays a role in shaping both the product and the culture.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description:
About Univrses
 
 Univrses is a Stockholm-based 3D Computer Vision and AI company. We provide the perception and spatial awareness necessary for an increasingly autonomous world. While our roots are in the automotive sector, we have pioneered a new category: Infrastructure Intelligence. Our 3DAI™ system transforms ordinary vehicles into sophisticated mobile sensors, providing road authorities across Europe (Sweden, UK, Italy, and beyond) with real-time, actionable insights. We are shifting city management from reactive repairs to proactive, data-driven maintenance—saving costs, reducing CO2 emissions, and improving public safety.
 



  




 The Role
 
 In your new developer role, you will take part in building the 3DAI™ platform. It is a scalable answer to the growing demand for data about the urban environment and part of our efforts in smart city development. You will play an important role in designing, building and scaling the platform. 3DAI™ is still a young product and you will have a lot to contribute and freedom to shape the project.
 


* You will be responsible for growing our platform for storing, processing and visualizing data.
* You will use your experience to design efficient solutions for our backend and frontend systems.
* You will have the opportunity to create innovative technologies that will change people's lives and transform the world into a better place



  




 Who you are
 * You have at least 3+ years of experience in Fullstack software development using Node.js and Typescript on the backend, and React (Vite SPA) on the frontend.
* You are experienced with AWS cloud platform development.
* You have excellent general understanding of REST APIs and GraphQL.
* You are comfortable taking high-level front-end designs and turning that into readable, maintainable, best-practice React code.
* You can build web-services from high level specifications, including figuring out database schemas, security considerations, logging and monitoring, and how best to scale out deployments to handle lots of users and data.
* You have an enthusiasm to tackle large-scale data challenges, with prior experience on high-performance analytic databases as a bonus.
* You like working in a team and sharing your knowledge. You are open to giving advice and listening to feedback.
* You are passionate about writing high-quality code and care for ensuring code validity by writing unit and integration tests.
* You keep up-to-date with best practices and new technologies.
* You have an aspiration to see your ideas move into production.



  




**Bonus points** 

 You have experience working with any of these systems or technologies:
 


* Serverless computing (e.g. AWS Lambdas)
* Familiar to infrastructure as code technologies such as Docker, AWS Cloudformation/CDK
* Geo spatial tools and databases such as PostGIS
* MUI (Material-UI) based front-end components
* E2E testing frameworks like Playwright

title: Backend Developer
description:
**About Froda** 




  





 Froda was founded in 2015 with a clear vision – to revolutionize the banking experience for entrepreneurs by making it easy and affordable to invest in their ideas. Today, we are one of Sweden's fastest-growing fintech companies with large international growth plans. We are a creative tech company with the ambition to turn a historically expensive and unfair industry into something ethical and sustainable by promoting entrepreneurship.
 



  





 Our mission to revolutionize the banking experience for entrepreneurs is not only reflected in our products but also in our workplace. By fostering a culture of respect, collaboration, and continuous learning, we provide opportunities for personal growth and professional development. Join us in transforming the banking industry and be a part of our journey to empower entrepreneurs.
 



  





**About The Role** 




  





 To further develop and scale our tech platform, enabling us to continue improving the banking experience for entrepreneurs, we are expanding our tech department. As a Backend Developer at Froda, you will be part of a cross-functional team working in one of our product areas — either developing features for our partners, improving our credit systems or maintaining our loan and payments core. For each team, the idea is to continuously deliver customer value as well as to improve the technical structure to make sure our systems are stable and healthy. Together with your team, you will design, build, and deliver scalable and maintainable solutions that directly impact our customers.
 



  





 You will get a unique chance to be a part of a scaling fintech company with strong momentum and a stable foundation, backed by a banking license as a quality stamp.
 



  





**Who are you?** 




  





 We believe that you are an experienced and curious developer who thrives in collaborative environments and is passionate about building scalable solutions with real impact. You enjoy working closely with other skilled and open-minded professionals and actively contribute to knowledge sharing and continuous improvement. You are a pragmatic problem solver who communicates clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders. You are fluent in both English and Swedish.
 



  





 We believe that you have experience of:
 



  




* At least 4 years in a similar role, ideally within product-focused teams
* Programming in C#/.NET with a solid understanding of modern software design principles
* Working with SQL and NoSQL databases in production environments
* Cloud platforms such as Azure (or other major providers)
* Agile methodologies and best practices in software engineering, including testing, CI/CD, and DevOps mindset
* Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, RabbitMQ, and microservices architecture is a strong plus



  





**What’s in it for you?** 




  





 At Froda, you’ll be part of a company that combines the best of both worlds – a fast-moving, high-energy culture with the stability and structure to support long-term success. We’re 100+ ambitious self-starters who genuinely care for each other and the work we do, all while having fun together.
 



  





 Here, you’ll have the opportunity to take ownership of your work, develop your skills, and shape your own growth journey. With big ambitions and a rapidly evolving business, there’s plenty of room to grow, lead initiatives, and make a real impact on both our company and the industry. If you're looking to be part of a success story and contribute to something bigger, this is the place for you.
 



  





 Furthermore, you’ll get:
 



  




* An opportunity to be part of an exciting journey, shaping the future of our company and transforming the SME financing landscape
* Fabulous office overlooking Stockholm and a friendly culture that values work/life balance
* We prioritize working in the office to maximize the positive impact of in-person collaboration, but we offer flexibility with work hours and remote work
* Competitive compensation package
* Insurance and pension plan



  





 This role is all about building the tech that powers funding for thousands of entrepreneurs —if you're excited by our mission, apply or tell a friend!

title: Senior Web Developer
description:
**What will you do?**
 As a Senior Web Developer at Rebtel, you will join the team replacing our old legacy system with a new one using Next.js, Typescript, GraphQL, React Testing Library, and Cypress. We’re looking for someone who can help us make the most of these technologies to build a sustainable and scalable platform that we’ll build on top of for years to come, while also maintaining our legacy system.
   

  

 We’re looking for an innovative engineer with a keen intuition for customer experience. Being part of the team at Rebtel means understanding and anticipating customer needs in an environment where your voice is encouraged.
   

  

 We work in an Agile environment to manage tasks and plan product roadmaps, involving regular goal-setting, backlog refinements, retrospectives, and clear communication. This approach enables developers to influence strategy, goals, and planning, everyone on the team is part of both planning and execution.
   

  

**Areas Of Ownership**
* Contribute expertise to elevate the web platform to the next level while actively sharing knowledge and learning from others in the team.
* Drive continuous improvements in user experience and enhance how users interact with the software.
* Contribute to designing and building complex software that is maintainable, secure, and scalable.
* Participate in technical discussions, uphold coding best practices, and strive to find the simplest possible solutions to complex problems.
* Ensure high-quality deliverables by covering edge cases and writing unit and integration tests.
* Collaborate effectively within the team and across functions, while also taking ownership as a sole developer within designated areas.


**Requirements**
* You are an excellent communicator and collaborator. We work in English, but you will hear many languages in our Stockholm office
* 5+ years of full-time professional experience
* Proficiency in JavaScript
* Experience working with TypeScript
* Experience with development lifecycle tools and processes (GitHub, Jira)
* Knowledgeable and experienced in modern JavaScript frameworks or libraries (React, Angular, Vue, etc.)
* Experience integrating REST APIs
* Experienced in writing clear and concise documentation
* Excellent communication skills in English
* Committed to writing structured, clean, and testable code
* Able to raise the level of everyone around you
* Enjoys hacking on new technology and loves R&D
* Always curious, always learning
* Has a vision for product development and how a codebase evolves


**Why Rebtel?**
 When you join Rebtel, you become part of a global team, bringing together diverse minds from every corner of the world. Our headquarter is nestled in Stockholm and here we strike a balance between dedicated work and more relaxed activities. Every Friday the unmistakable aroma of freshly popped popcorn fills the air, but our celebrations encompass everything from minor and major common accomplishments to cinnamon bun day.
   

  

**Benefits**
 At Rebtel, you are the most important asset and we strive to provide a comprehensive package of benefits and perks that enhance your well-being and work experience. Here are some of the things you can expect from us:
   

  

* Pension Plan
* Health Checkups, Influenza shots and Private Medical Insurance
* Dental Insurance
* Occupational insurance
* Wellness allowance (5,000 SEK)
* Discount on gym memberships
* Bonus program
* Extra parental pay
* 30 days annual vacation
* Monday breakfasts
* Relocation Support, if you're joining us from afar, we'll assist you in making a smooth transition.


 Rebtel is an international workplace, and at the office, we speak English; therefore, high English proficiency is required. We are committed to being an LGBTQIA+ safe workplace, a place where individuals can be open about who they are without fear of discrimination or harassment.
   

  

*We are Rebtel. We come from all around the world to create products for anyone who has crossed a border. We believe in equal opportunity and value diversity at our company. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status.*
 Rebtel is a company of about 70 people from 31 countries who share a common mission to empower diaspora communities around the world to stay connected to where they come from. From our office in central Stockholm, we help our user base of 1 million dual-culture people—predominantly from the global south—connect with and support their communities through affordable data-free international calling and mobile top-ups. With our app and online platform, we help dissolve the space between their worlds so they can live more connected lives.

title: Senior SQL / C# Developer | SEB, Solna
description:
Would you like to join an innovative team of highly skilled employees in a fast-paced agile environment where time-to-market and quality are essential?
   

  

 Since SEB was founded in 1856, our focus on customers and long-term relationships has been at the heart of our success. We aim to drive positive change by providing capital to help everyone reach their goals and accelerate progress towards a sustainable tomorrow. As a leading financial services group in northern Europe, we'll help you grow and empower you to take on more responsibility to create a real difference. Welcome to SEB.
   

  

**About the role:**
 We are looking for a SQL and C# Developer to join our Trading Regulatory Reporting Team in Solna within SEB’s Technology area. The team already consists of dedicated persons who are delivering regulatory reporting for SEB and its clients.
   

  

 You will be based in Stockholm and work in an international and friendly environment in close cooperation with different teams in Sweden and Latvia. We see you as a candidate that can play an important role in our SAFe agile team, working on transforming, developing and maintaining our applications. It’s natural for you to have an end-to-end ownership - from breaking down requirements through development and all the way to testing, ensuring seamless delivery without handovers.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, we believe you have:**
* Highly skilled in MS SQL and C# .Net
* A bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent
* A strong curiosity about AI, with initial experience and a clear ambition to continuously explore and deepen your knowledge.
* Strong analytical skills and the ability to break down complex problems and identify patterns
* Experience of large administrative systems with many integrations, built on Microsoft platform
* Experience of system design
* Experience of assuring quality of deliveries and working with test automation
* Experience from Git, GitHub and Azure DevOps
* Experience from message-oriented middleware (MOM)
* A coaching mindset and are ready to share knowledge with the rest of the team
* Great communication skills and fluency in English
* We also believe you are enjoying the Agile way of working


**It is meritorious if you have:**
* Experience of working in a bank with trading or reporting applications
* Experience of developing cloud applications
* Experience with parallel and concurrent programming (message passing paradigm)
* Experience of integration data design


**What we offer:**
* Entrepreneurial Scandinavian environment
* Hybrid work model, meaning remote work is possible up to 2 days/week
* International opportunities and working environment
* Attractive compensation and access to SEB staff banking with exclusive benefits


**Do you want to be part of SEB?**
 It is our fundamental belief that inclusion and diversity is crucial for our future success. We strive to have an inclusive, value-driven culture where employees feel valued, respected, and involved irrespective of who they are, what they believe or where they come from. Since we select candidates continuously, feel free to send in your application today via the link in this ad, but no later than 14th of May 2026. If you have questions about the position, please contact Hiring manager Nicklas Svanehav at nicklas.svanehav@seb.se, but we will not process applications via email.
   

  

 Please be aware that our final candidates undergo background checks, a process that includes for example identity control, verification of qualifications, credit checks, company engagements and criminal records checks. In some cases, we also apply random drug checks. During employment, employees within SEB can also expect to undergo recurring background checks.
   

  

 SEB Sweden has a redeployment responsibility, why this position might be covered by internal redeployment.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Purpose of the role**
 We are looking for a C++ Software Engineer to join the team behind Candy Crush Saga within the Gameplay area. Gameplay teams in this area work on features that support player progression, competitive and cooperative challenges, and other systems that keep the game evolving for millions of players around the
   

  

 world. Our engineers are at the heart of our game development. In this role, you will work closely with designers, producers, artists, and other engineers to bring new gameplay ideas to life. You will join a collaborative and experienced engineering organization, where you’ll have opportunities to learn from more senior engineers while contributing to a large and evolving codebase.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who is curious, eager to learn, and enjoys collaborating with others to solve problems. As the Candy Crush client is a mature and continuously evolving codebase, being comfortable exploring new systems and picking up new concepts will be important
   

  

**Your role within the kingdom**
 As a software engineer you will:
   

  

* Develop and maintain gameplay systems and features in C++ within the Candy Crush Saga client
* Work closely with designers, artists, and producers to transform gameplay ideas into polished player


 experiences
   

  

* Contribute to systems that support player progression, challenges, and evolving gameplay


 experiences
   

  

* Participate in technical discussions, design reviews, and code reviews with your team
* Collaborate with other engineers to improve code quality and development practices
* You follow and participate in the investigation and mitigation of live incidents.
* Share progress, ideas, and challenges openly with your team
* Continuously learn and grow while working in a large and evolving codebase


**Skills To Create Thrills**
 We believe great engineers come from many backgrounds, but you will likely have:
   

  

* Experience programming in C++
* Strong problem-solving skills and curiosity about how complex systems work
* A collaborative mindset and good communication skills
* A strong sense of quality and pride in the work you deliver
* Interest in learning and growing as part of an experienced engineering tea


 Experience with games, gameplay systems, or large codebases is a plus, but not required.
   

  

**Life at King**
 At King, we’re serious about fun. Our games are played by millions of people around the world and Candy
   

  

 Crush Saga continues to evolve years after its launch.
   

  

 You’ll work alongside experienced engineers, designers, and creatives to build gameplay systems that shape
   

  

**How Players Progress And Experience The Game.**
 Not sure you meet all the skills required? Let us decide! Research shows that women and members of other
   

  

 under- represented groups tend to not apply to jobs when they think they may not meet every qualification,
   

  

 when, in fact, they often do! We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment and strongly
   

  

 encourage you to apply.
   

  

**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Senior Software Engineer - Netsuite
description:
**About Acast**
 Since 2014, Acast has been building the world’s most valuable podcast marketplace, creating the technology that connects podcast creators, advertisers, and listeners. Its marketplace spans more than 140,000 podcasts, 3,300 advertisers, and one billion quarterly listens. Crucially, those listens are monetized wherever they happen—across any podcast app or listening platform.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer that has the ability to work with Netsuite and SuiteScript development to build custom applications and integrations. You will work in an autonomous, purpose driven team and take an important role in shipping new features while continuously increasing efficiency, stability and scalability of our financial systems.
   

  

 Beyond strong technical execution, the role requires an ability to interpret business and problem formulations together with your team, drive clarity, and turn that shared understanding into effective technical solutions. You are also expected to ensure that Acast continues to follow cutting edge development practices, both in our codebase and in how we shape our processes.
   

  

**What You´ll Do**
* Write and test modern SuiteScript of all types, including Suitelets, Restlets, and Scheduled scripts.
* Design and implement API integrations and SuiteFlow workflows.
* Manage relationships and technical requirements with key stakeholders from our commercial and finance departments.
* Take shared operational responsibility for the services owned by your team, including support duties and taking part in an on-call rotation.
* Work in a multi-disciplinary environment with agile principles.
* Mentor others in the technical aspects you are already an expert in and value working in a diverse team.


**Who you are**
* You have 3 or more years of experience in Netsuite development.
* You have professional experience in financial engineering.
* You are comfortable with Node.js and Typescript.
* You have a pragmatic mindset and can make trade-offs on what to optimize for and when to ship.
* You are curious, can adapt quickly, and enjoy a dynamic environment.
* You have an interest in or experience with AWS, C#, or Salesforce.


**Culture**
 Acast is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of race, gender, sexual orientation, religion, ethnicity, national origin or any of the other wonderful characteristics that make us different.
   

  

 Culture is our number one priority as a business. We believe people come first, and we work every day to enable autonomy, continuous improvement and bring out the best in people. We’re global and have remote teams, so it’s even more important that we strive for an open, inclusive and caring environment where everyone feels visible and welcome.
   

  

 We consider ourselves a modern organization driven by strong values to create the best, most fulfilling and nurturing culture.
   

  

 We very much look forward to finding the next great person to join our cause!

title: ServiceNow-utvecklare till Sopra Steria
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Om Oss**
 Sopra Steria är Europas ledande konsultföretag inom ServiceNow och digital transformation. Vi hjälper företag och organisationer att effektivisera sina verksamheter genom innovativa teknologilösningar. Med fler än 4000 ServiceNow-experter besitter vi marknadens största och mest framstående ServiceNow-team där får du möjligheten att arbeta med dem mest spännande projekten samt utvecklas i en dynamisk och framåtlutad arbetsmiljö. Nu tar vi nästa stora kliv och satsar ännu hårdare på vår ledande position inom ServiceNow. Hos oss får du chansen att vara med och driva utvecklingen framåt, forma framtidens lösningar och göra verklig skillnad. Vill du vara en del av vårt ledande team?
   

  

**Om Rollen**
 Vi söker en driven ServiceNow-utvecklare som vill vara med och skapa skräddarsydda digitala lösningar för våra kunder. I denna roll kommer du att arbeta med utveckling, konfiguration och anpassning av ServiceNow-plattformen, med fokus på att effektivisera och automatisera affärsprocesser. Du kommer arbeta i teamleveranser tillsammans med experter som utvecklar innovativa lösningar baserade på ServiceNow och low-code-teknologier.
   

  

**Dina Arbetsuppgifter**
* Utveckla och konfigurera ServiceNow-applikationer och arbetsflöden.
* Implementera low-code/no-code-lösningar med hjälp av ServiceNow App Engine.
* Anpassa och optimera affärsprocesser genom automation och integrationer.
* Samarbeta med kunder och interna team för att identifiera och lösa affärsutmaningar.
* Följa best practices och säkerställa kvalitet i kod och konfiguration.


**För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du bör ha:**
* Minst 3 års erfarenhet av utveckling i ServiceNow eller andra low-code-plattformar.
* Kunskap i JavaScript och webbutveckling (HTML, CSS).
* Förståelse för olika ServiceNow-moduler och certifiering inom plattformen är starkt meriterande.
* Förmåga att analysera och förbättra affärsprocesser med hjälp av teknik.
* En stark vilja att utvecklas och arbeta i en konsultroll.
* Flytande svenska och engelska i tal samt skrift.


**Vi Erbjuder**
* En spännande arbetsmiljö hos Europas ledande ServiceNow-konsultbolag.
* Möjlighet att arbeta med innovativa lösningar och den senaste tekniken.
* Kompetensutveckling genom certifieringar, utbildningar och mentorskap.
* Hybrid arbetsmodell samt konkurrenskraftiga villkor och förmåner


**Om ServiceNow-teamet På Sopra Steria**
 Sopra Steria är Nordens ledande expert inom ServiceNow – vi har den största och mest specialiserade kompetensen på marknaden. Som ElitePartner till ServiceNow levererar vårt starka och sammansvetsade team omfattande och högkvalitativa lösningar, där flera av våra erfarna ServiceNow-konsulter samarbetar för att maximera värdet för våra kunder. Vi drivs av innovation, samarbete och kunskapsutbyte – tillsammans sätter vi nya standarder och skapar framtidens digitala lösningar. Vill du arbeta med de bästa? Då är Sopra Steria platsen för dig.
   

  

**Om Sopra Steria**
 Sopra Steria är en av Europas ledande aktörer inom digital transformation, med över 60 000 medarbetare i mer än 30 länder globalt. Vi driver innovation och hjälper företag och organisationer att effektivisera, utvecklas och skapa långsiktigt värde genom banbrytande teknologilösningar.
   

  

 Hos oss arbetar de främsta experterna inom sina områden i en dynamisk och framtidsorienterad miljö där samarbete, nytänkande och teknisk spetskompetens står i centrum.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Om du är redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär och vara en del av vårt framstående team, ansök genom att ladda upp ditt CV. Kontakta gärna ansvarig rekryterare, Teodor Nellvik (teodor.nellvik@soprasteria.com) eller Business Owner Mikael Kroglund (mikael.kroglund@soprasteria.com), för eventuella frågor om tjänsten.
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

**Välkommen till Sopra Steria - där din kompetens formar framtidens digitala lösningar!**
**Ytterligare information**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande internationellt konsultbolag inom digital transformation. Vi bygger samhället genom designdriven innovation, teknisk utveckling med kunskap om marknadens ledande plattformar och driftlösningar (managed services). Med modern teknologi och en gedigen affärsförståelse är vi en helhetspartner för våra kunder och deras digitala transformationsresa. Enligt Great Place To Work är vi en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser, vi har tilldelats utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad och Gartner har listat oss som ett topp 5 bolag inom digital transformation.

title: C++ Developer
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
 We are looking for a C++ engineer to join the SDK Core team in Stockholm. Our team sits inside King's Shared Tech organisation, and what we build matters: the cross-platform SDK that powers some of the most played mobile games in the world, including Candy Crush Saga.
   

  

 If you love writing clean, thoughtful code and want to see it run on millions of devices, this is the role.
   

  

 Your role within our Kingdom
   

  

 Game developers at King build amazing experiences. Our job is to give them the tools to do it faster and better. We architect and design SDKs that connect game client code to game engines, back-end services, and platform infrastructure across iOS, Android, Windows, and the web.
   

  

 When we ship something good, every game team at King benefits.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will include
   

  

* Design and build SDK Modules that game teams rely on every day
* Own your work end to end: from understanding the requirement, writing a spec, and building the feature, to helping other teams integrate it
* Review code, give honest feedback, and welcome it on your own work
* Investigate live issues, profile performance, fix bugs, and chip away at tech debt. I.e. the full picture, not just the exciting parts.
* Collaborate with engineers across King, and sometimes with non-engineers, to find the best solution


 Skills to create thrills
   

  

 You care about your craft. You write code you are proud of, and you ask questions when something doesn't make sense.
   

  

* Great team working skills
* Strong C++ programming language skills, with experience in some of the following areas:
+ Modern C++ (We currently use C++23)
+ Concurrent programming techniques and best practices
+ Generic programming and templating techniques
+ Debugging

* Passion for software development and quality
* Good at both sharing and taking in ideas. Our work often involves collaborating with teams across the company to achieve consensus when problem solving
* Able to adapt to the task at hand. We work with both development and support tasks
* Experience using Git version control system


* Experience developing on any of: iOS, Android, Windows (UWP / Windows App SDK), Emscripten or Unity
* Working with CMake or Bazel for build configuration
* Python scripting
* SDK or library development
* Experience with CI pipelines; setting them up, keeping them green, and knowing what to do when they go red
* Ability to work with a high degree of independence while keeping people in the loop


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer
description:
RED is currently looking for an experienced AI Engineer for an initial 6 month contract based near Stockholm. This role is suited to a hands-on AI Developer with strong backend engineering experience and a solid understanding of LLMs, AI agents, RAG pipelines, cloud deployment, and production-grade application development.
 



  





 You will be responsible for designing, building, and operating AI-enabled backend systems, with a focus on accuracy, performance, cost efficiency, reliability, and integration with enterprise data and systems.
 



  





**Contract Details** 



* **Role:** 
 AI Engineer
* **Location:** 
 Near Stockholm
* **Contract Type:** 
 B2B
* **Duration:** 
 6 Months
* **Work Model:** 
 Hybrid
* **Start Date:** 
 ASAP



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Design, build, and maintain production-grade backend systems using Python or TypeScript
* Develop and operate AI agents that interact with tools, workflows, data sources, and enterprise systems
* Build and support LLM-based applications, including agent-based systems and retrieval-augmented generation solutions
* Design and maintain RAG pipelines, vector search solutions, and enterprise data querying capability
* Deploy and manage cloud-based applications using AWS ECS, Fargate, S3, RDS, and Cognito
* Work across cloud infrastructure, backend services, data layers, AI agent logic, and workflow orchestration
* Manage infrastructure as code using Terraform
* Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines, ideally using GitLab
* Optimise AI solutions for accuracy, performance, cost, reliability, governance, and observability
* Collaborate with technical and business teams to integrate AI solutions into enterprise environments



  





**Key Skills Required** 



* Strong hands-on development experience with Python
* Experience with TypeScript would also be beneficial
* Strong backend engineering experience, ideally building production-grade systems
* Strong experience with Docker
* Cloud deployment experience within AWS
* Experience with AWS services such as ECS, Fargate, S3, RDS, and Cognito
* Experience with Terraform and infrastructure as code
* Experience with CI/CD pipelines, preferably GitLab
* Strong understanding of LLMs and agent-based AI systems
* Experience with RAG pipelines, vector search, and enterprise data retrieval
* Strong SQL experience for querying enterprise data sources
* Ability to design and operate AI agents beyond basic prompt engineering
* Understanding of performance, reliability, cost, and accuracy considerations in AI systems



  





 If this is something you are interested in, please send me an up-to-date CV, and we can discuss the role in more detail.

title: Backend platform developer
description:
**About us** 




 Hacksaw Studios is a Stockholm-based game studio focused on creating innovative, high-quality gaming experiences. With a focus on performance and precision, we bring ideas to life through technical expertise and creative collaboration. We have wide distribution, and our games are played by millions of people every month by players all over the world.
 



  





 We are now looking for a C# platform developer to join our growing Stockholm team. You'll be the person helping build and maintain the high-performance backend systems that power our games and platform infrastructure. You'll be solving real technical challenges that impact thousands of active users, collaborating closely with product teams, and helping ensure our platform is robust and ready for future growth.
 



  





**The Role** 




 Your key responsibilities include:
 


* Design & Implement Features: Build robust, scalable features for our C# / ASP.NET-based platform and supporting systems.
* Optimize Performance: Ensure code and data structures deliver high throughput, low latency, and reliable processing of thousands of transactions per second.
* Testing & Stability: Write and maintain comprehensive unit tests to ensure platform stability.
* Code Collaboration: Participate in code reviews and contribute to clean, maintainable, and well-documented code.
* Technical Documentation: Maintain clear and thorough technical documentation.
* Team Coordination: Work closely with peers and product teams to maintain architectural consistency and meet performance standards.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* Strong experience in C# backend development.
* Solid understanding of ASP.NET (experience preferred but can be developed on the job).
* Deep knowledge of SQL, including writing efficient queries and designing high-performance database schemas.
* Practical experience with caching strategies (e.g., Redis).
* Expertise in multithreaded programming and thread-safe design patterns.
* Proficiency in using the C# debugger for troubleshooting complex issues.
* A mindset focused on performance, scalability, and reliability.



  





**Nice-to-have:** 



* Experience with automated unit testing frameworks.
* A university degree in Computer Science or related field.
* Interest in gaming, professionally or recreationally.
* Experience with front-end development.
* Experience mentoring or coaching other colleagues.



  





**What We Offer** 



* A modern office in central Stockholm.
* Work with experienced, passionate colleagues in the gaming industry.
* The opportunity to create games with a global audience.
* Real influence, ownership, and personal growth opportunities.
* Wellbeing perks including wellness allowance and regular in-office massage.



  





**Practical Details** 



* This is an on-site position in Stockholm.
* Unfortunately, we cannot assist with relocation or visa sponsorship.



  





 If you would like more information or have questions about the position, you are welcome to contact our recruitment consultant Henrik Dellgren or Elin Lidström at Novare, email: henrik.dellgren@novare.se / elin.lidstrom@novare.se
 



  





**Ready to Join the Game Makers?** 




 Apply now! We review applications on a rolling basis.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description:
We are looking for a
 **Senior Backend Software Engineer Contractor** 
 to join our security compliance engineering team. You will contribute to the design and delivery of the next generation of our compliance enforcement platform; architecting core systems that ensure every change to production code meets regulatory and security standards across thousands of repositories. This role involves high-impact, high-autonomy work where you'll own technical decisions end-to-end, from schema design to production rollout, directly affecting audit outcomes.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities:**
* Drive the design and development of backend services in Java (Spring Boot, Apollo) that enforce change management compliance controls across clients' GitHub Enterprise environments.
* Architect and build scalable compliance tooling with high reliability and integrity requirements.
* Lead a major platform re-architecture that introduces layered policy enforcement leveraging GitHub Enterprise Cloud's native capabilities, replacing a monolithic compliance engine with a modular, scalable design.
* Build and maintain data pipelines (e.g., BigQuery, Flyte, Scala) that power compliance reporting, violation analytics, and audit evidence generation.
* Ensure SOX/ITGC audit requirements are met through continuous compliance evidence and engineering controls that withstand auditor scrutiny.
* Collaborate with cross-functional stakeholders including internal audit, platform developer experience teams, and security teams.


**Key Requirements:**
* 8+ years of professional development experience in Java (Spring Boot, Bazel, Maven) and with a strong focus on data engineering.
* Experience architecting and owning distributed, high-volume services end-to-end, from design through production operations on Kubernetes (GKE).
* Strong API design skills, including gRPC, GraphQL, and REST, with experience in GitHub APIs or similar platform integrations at scale.
* Deep understanding of system design, data modeling, and relational databases (e.g., PostgreSQL).
* Commitment to delivering high-quality, well-tested code in compliance-sensitive environments.
* Hands-on experience with GCP services including GKE, Cloud SQL, BigQuery, and cloud-native monitoring and logging.
* Experience or strong interest in security compliance engineering, including ITGC/SOX frameworks.
* Familiarity with complex build systems (e.g., Bazel, Maven, Gradle) and CI/CD pipelines, and ability to work autonomously.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, including the ability to write clear RFCs and technical documentation.
* Familiarity with security tooling and compliance standards.
* Experience working in a monorepo environment.


**Other Details:**
 Start: ASAP
   

  

 Length: Until May 10, 2027
   

  

 Workplace: Sweden. Candidates must be based in Sweden.

title: Entry level: Graduates to Silicon Academy (Kista)
description:
**Join our Team**
**About The Opportunity**
 At Ericsson Silicon, we design the application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) and Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs) that power our 5G and future 6G radio networks. As a new graduate ASIC Developer, you will join a highly skilled team working with advanced technology nodes, world class EDA tools and end to end silicon development for our Radio System portfolio.
   

  

 This full-time role is aimed at Master’s/Bachelor’s students and recent graduates who are passionate about digital design and want to start their career in microelectronics.
   

  

 To help you get started in Silicon, we offer an internal Silicon Academy. This is a 4-month program with hands-on training, support from industry experts, and work on real projects. The program covers all key parts of ASIC and FPGA development for Ericsson Radio Systems, helping you quickly build skills for end-to-end development.
   

  

 After completing Silicon Academy, you will be well prepared to continue your permanent employment at Ericsson Silicon and pursue your career in roles such as FPGA Developer, ASIC IP Designer/Verifier, ASIC Level Integrator/Backend Engineer/Verifier, Validation Engineer or System Architect.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Contribute to the design and implementation of digital logic for Ericsson’s radio ASICs or FPGAs (IP and/or SoC level).
* Work with RTL design and/or verification (e.g. SystemVerilog /UVM), from specification to clean, synthesizable code and robust testbenches.
* Work between RTL and physical design, generating the first netlist and make sure it meets timing, power, and area targets.
* Participate in micro architecture, documentation, code reviews and design quality improvements.
* Collaborate closely with colleagues in areas such as architecture, physical design, verification firmware and system teams across Sweden and other global design centres.
* Support integration, validation and lab bring up to ensure that the ASIC meets power, performance and quality targets.
* Continuously learn new tools, methods and technologies and share knowledge within the team.


**The Skills You Bring**
* Master's or Bachelor's degree (recent or soon-to-be graduates, no later than August 2026) in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science/Engineering, Engineering Physics, or a related field. A Master's program in Embedded Systems is considered a strong advantage.
* Good understanding of digital design fundamentals (combinational/sequential logic, finite state machines, clocking, reset).
* Practical experience from coursework, lab work, or thesis projects in RTL design and/or verification, utilizing technologies such as VHDL, Verilog, SystemVerilog, or UVM.
* Basic familiarity with ASIC/FPGA flows (simulation, synthesis, static timing, lint, etc.) is a strong plus.
* Hands-on experience in building and using AI agents and understanding how agent-based AI workflows can be applied to silicon development (e.g., automation, verification support, analysis, or productivity enhancement).
* Knowledge of practical experience in signal processing, and high-speed interfaces (e.g., SerDes/DDR) is considered a merit.


**Who You Are**
* Curious, a fast learner, and not afraid to ask questions.
* A collaborative team player who communicates clearly and confidently in English (both written & spoken).
* Structured and quality-focused, with a strong sense of ownership in your tasks.


**What We Offer**
* The opportunity to work on cutting edge ASICs and FPGAs that are core to Ericsson’s 5G and future 6G radio products.
* A supportive environment with mentorship, learning platforms and early career communities, enabling you to grow from graduate to specialist.
* Flexible ways of working, a diverse and inclusive culture, and colleagues who are passionate about technology and collaboration.


**How To Apply**
 Attach your CV, a short cover letter and grade transcripts (including any ongoing courses). We'd love to hear about your relevant experience, so please highlight:
   

  

* Relevant projects, thesis work or lab assignments within digital/ASIC/FPGA design or verification.
* Student jobs, internships, or extracurricular activities that show your interest in hardware, microelectronics, or telecom.


 We welcome applications from recent graduates and students in their final year who can start latest by end of August 2026. We review applications continuously and look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

**What happens once you apply?**
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.We encourage you to consider applying to jobs where you might not meet all the criteria. We recognize that we all have transferrable skills, and we can support you with the skills that you need to develop.Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.
   

  

**Primary country and city:** 
 Sweden (SE) ||
   

  

**Job details:** 
 Developer

title: Senior Software Engineer — AI Code Ranking
description:
**About The Role**
 What if your deep software engineering expertise could directly shape how the next generation of AI writes code? We're looking for senior-level developers to evaluate, compare, and rank AI-generated code — helping AI systems learn what separates good code from great code.
   

  

 You'll review pairs of code solutions, assess them on correctness, efficiency, readability, and best practices, and provide the preference rankings that teach AI models to produce better software. Your engineering judgment becomes the training signal that makes AI smarter.
   

  

 This is a fully remote, flexible contract role designed for experienced software engineers who want meaningful, intellectually engaging work on their own schedule.
   

  

* Organization: Alignerr
* Type: Hourly Contract
* Location: Remote
* Commitment: 10–40 hours/week


**What You'll Do**
* Compare pairs of AI-generated code solutions and rank them based on quality, correctness, and engineering best practices
* Evaluate code for functional accuracy — verifying that solutions produce correct outputs across standard and edge cases
* Assess code quality factors including readability, efficiency, maintainability, and adherence to idiomatic patterns
* Identify bugs, logic errors, security issues, and performance bottlenecks in AI-generated code
* Write clear, structured justifications explaining your ranking decisions
* Work across multiple programming languages and problem domains — from algorithms and data structures to systems design and API integrations
* Complete task-based assignments independently on your own schedule


**Who You Are**
* Senior-level software engineer with 5+ years of professional development experience
* Proficient in at least two of the following: Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Java, C++, Go, or Rust
* Strong understanding of algorithms, data structures, and computational complexity
* Experienced in code review — you can quickly spot issues and articulate what makes one solution better than another
* Deep knowledge of software engineering best practices: clean code, design patterns, testing, and performance optimization
* Clear written communicator who can explain technical reasoning concisely
* Self-motivated and consistent when working independently without supervision


**Nice to Have**
* Experience with machine learning, AI/ML pipelines, or training data curation
* Background in competitive programming, technical interviewing, or algorithmic problem-solving
* Familiarity with RLHF (Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback) or preference-based AI training
* Experience across both backend and frontend development
* Contributions to open-source projects or technical mentoring experience
* Knowledge of security best practices and common vulnerability patterns


**Why Join Us**
* Work on cutting-edge AI projects alongside leading research labs
* Fully remote and flexible — work when and where it suits you
* Freelance autonomy with the structure of meaningful, task-based work
* Your engineering expertise directly shapes how AI understands and generates code at scale
* Intellectually stimulating work that keeps your skills sharp across languages and domains
* Potential for ongoing work and contract extension as new projects launch

title: ServiceNow Developer på B3 Now
description:
Är du en vass ServiceNow-utvecklare som vill vara med och forma framtiden i ett snabbväxande specialistbolag?
   

  

**B3 Now** 
 är en del av B3 Consulting Group och ett av koncernens nyare specialistbolag med fullt fokus på ServiceNow. Här arbetar du i en start-up-liknande miljö där energi, innovation och nyfikenhet präglar vardagen. Hos oss bygger du moderna applikationer, utvecklar smarta lösningar och skapar verkligt affärsvärde för våra kunder.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som
 **ServiceNow Developer** 
 hos B3 Now blir du en viktig del av ett team av erfarna ServiceNow-specialister. Du arbetar i projekt och uppdrag med hög påverkan hos både nationella och internationella kunder inom bl.a. tillverkning, retail, finans, energi, telekom och offentlig sektor.
   

  

 Du kommer att utveckla, konfigurera och förbättra lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen. Rollen är teknisk och hands-on, med stort fokus på programmering, modern utveckling och kvalitetssäkring.
   

  

 Du kommer bland annat att:
   

  

* Utveckla lösningar i ServiceNow med moderna kodningsmetoder och enligt best practice.
* Arbeta med Flow Designer, IntegrationHub, Scripted REST APIs och andra automatiserings- och integrationskomponenter.
* Utveckla användargränssnitt, formulär och logik genom både low-code och custom code.
* Översätta funktionella krav till tekniska lösningar.
* Samarbeta nära kundens verksamhet för att skapa värdeskapande lösningar.
* Bidra med teknisk rådgivning i utvecklings- och arkitekturfrågor.


 Vi söker dig som är en utvecklarprofil med stark teknisk grund och intresse för både kod och affär.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har följande kvalifikationer:**
* Relevant akademisk examen eller motsvarande.
* 3–5 års erfarenhet av ServiceNow-utveckling, inklusive hands-on programmering.
* Erfarenhet av JavaScript, REST, SOAP, Scripted REST APIs samt arbete med XML/JSON.
* Erfarenhet av ServiceNow-moduler och relevanta certifieringar (ex.CAD, CIS).
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska.
* En analytisk, kommunikativ och lösningsorienterad approach.
* Förmåga att arbeta strukturerat, tänka kreativt och hantera komplexa tekniska utmaningar.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* Attraktiv och flexibel lönemodell.
* Möjlighet att påverka dina arbetstider och arbetsplats.
* Utbildningar för din professionella utveckling.
* En stark wellness-satsning genom Team B3, som främjar både hälsa och arbetsglädje.
* Kollegor med höga ambitioner och olika bakgrunder – ett inkluderande och internationellt mindset.
* En utmanande roll med stora möjligheter att växa tekniskt och professionellt.
* En kultur där vi både levererar värde till våra kunder och har roligt tillsammans.
* Möjlighet att påverka, bidra och vara med och forma framtiden för B3 Now.


**Om B3**
 På B3 Now tror vi på att kombinera yrkesstolthet med glädje. Vi drivs av att göra skillnad – både för våra kunder och våra kollegor. Vi bygger en miljö där lärande, samarbete och utveckling står i centrum, och där du får utrymme att växa i den riktning du vill.
   

  

 Vi investerar i din kompetens genom utbildningar, mentorprogram och kontinuerlig coaching. Vi tror att när du utvecklas, utvecklas även vi.
   

  

 B3 Now är en del av B3 Consulting Group, ett av Sveriges snabbast växande konsultbolag. Med kontor i Sverige, Norge och Polen och internationella samarbeten hjälper vi organisationer att maximera värdet av ServiceNow genom smarta, skalbara och effektiva lösningar.
   

  

 Vi är över 1000 specialister globalt i koncernen – och växer snabbt. Hos oss får du både tryggheten av en stor aktör och närheten i ett mindre bolag där du har stort inflytande.
   

  

**Kontakt** 
 Är du redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär? Ansök nu! Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta Stefan Saarnak på +46 76 725 7059

title: Test Automation Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
 Technology & Development
   

  

**Job Description:**
**AI Test Automation Engineer (C++/Gen AI) - Live Operations, Shared Tech**
**Job Description:**
 We are looking for an experienced AI Test Automation Engineer to join the Live Operations team within King’s Shared Tech organisation. You will help improve the quality and release confidence of our mobile games and shared technology by building scalable test automation, leveraging C++ and modern Generative AI tools (e.g., Claude/Codex or similar) to accelerate development, coverage, and investigation.
   

  

 Shared Tech’s mission is to provide a competitive technological advantage for game teams at King, enabling them to deliver amazing player experiences across our portfolio, including Candy Crush Saga.
   

  

 Your role within our Kingdom:
   

  

 You will design and implement automated testing solutions for mobile games and shared SDK/engine components. Your focus will be to prevent regressions, reduce manual testing effort, improve CI signal, and shorten time-to-diagnosis when issues occur. You will work closely with engineers and technical leaders across teams to ensure testing is built into the development lifecycle.
   

  

**Your responsibilities will include:**
* Design, build, and maintain automated test frameworks and tooling for mobile games and shared tech (SDK/Engine components).
* Develop reliable test automation in C++ (and other suitable languages/tools where appropriate), with strong emphasis on maintainability and clarity.
* Use Generative AI tools (e.g., Claude/Codex or similar) to accelerate test development: generating test code, expanding scenario coverage, improving diagnostics, and supporting rapid iteration, while following security and privacy best practices.
* Create automated regression suites and CI quality gates (smoke, functional, integration, performance) with actionable reporting and low flakiness.
* Build AI-assisted testing approaches where valuable (e.g., scenario exploration, playthrough agents, test generation), and define strategies to keep results reproducible and trustworthy.
* Partner with game teams to understand risk areas and quality goals. Translate them into automation plans and measurable metrics.
* Investigate, diagnose, and help resolve complex issues across Android (NDK) and iOS, producing clear root-cause reports and improving test coverage to prevent repeats.
* Drive improvements in test reliability and developer experience: faster pipelines, better failure artifacts, and reduced triage time.
* Participate in code/design reviews. Promote high engineering standards, quality ownership, and knowledge sharing.


**Skills to create thrills:**
 You have great passion for programming and are committed to quality and polish. As a developer you are also analytical and naturally curious about understanding the entire tech stack.
   

  

* Strong test automation expertise (framework design, test strategy, CI integration, flaky test reduction).
* Solid C++ skills (modern C++ preferred) and strong debugging ability.
* Experience testing mobile applications/games, ideally across Android and iOS.
* Practical experience using Generative AI tools (e.g., Claude/Codex or similar) to improve productivity in software development/testing.
* Strong analytical mindset, ownership, and ability to work independently with minimal guidance while collaborating proactively.


**Bonus Points:**
* Python for automation/tooling.
* Experience with build and CI systems (e.g., CMake/Gradle/Bazel, GitHub/Jenkins, SonarQube or similar).
* Familiarity with graphics/rendering pipelines or performance tooling (FPS, memory, battery, startup time).
* Backend familiarity (e.g., Java) for integration testing of connected game services.


**A Great Saga Needs All Sorts of Heroes:**
 Making games is fun. Especially when you do it with people who share the same idea of what makes a good workplace great. We design games for everyone, no matter where they are or who they are, and we employ all sorts of people from all kinds of backgrounds to bring them to life. Truth is, we simply cannot expect diversity in our players and originality in our games without first nurturing it in our people. A great saga needs all sorts of heroes.
   

  

 Making the World Playful:
   

  

 Making the World Playful inspires us to create new experiences and raise the bar. We combine creativity and craft with curiosity for the unexplored, respect for each other, and love for our players, while having fun along the way.
   

  

**About King**
 King is a leading interactive entertainment company for the mobile world, with franchises including Candy Crush, Farm Heroes, Pet Rescue and Bubble Witch. King is part of Microsoft, with teams across multiple locations worldwide.
   

  

****About King****
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Senior Business Developer
description:
**⚡️ What We Do**
 Flower is Flexible Power. We are a next-gen energy company leveraging AI and machine learning to make renewable energy stable and always available – even when the sun isn’t shining and the wind isn’t blowing.
   

  

 Through smart optimization and trading of energy assets like wind and solar farms, battery systems, and EV chargers, we make renewable energy reliable and predictable, leading the charge towards the energy system of tomorrow.
   

  

**🌟Who We Are**
 Tech company at heart. Purpose-driven at core. Flower consists of a diverse group of innovative individuals with a strong desire to improve the state of the world.
   

  

 At Flower, we believe trust, collaboration and diversity are essential to not only create an inclusive work environment, but also drive career growth. By embracing varying perspectives, we allow creativity and progress to flourish.
   

  

 To accelerate towards our goal of becoming the pioneering force powering the energy system of tomorrow, we are now looking for a passionate and skilled Senior Business Developer.
   

  

**👩‍💻 About The Role**
 You will play a key commercial role in scaling Flower’s Distributed Assets business by leading partnerships across retailers, BRPs, OEMs, and other asset-enabling partners within the flexibility market. You will drive the full commercial process from initial outreach to signed agreements, while shaping how partners adopt and integrate Flower’s flexibility offering. This role combines strategic influence with hands-on execution and is central to unlocking partner-driven capacity growth required for Flower’s long-term success.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead commercial engagements with retailers, BRPs, OEMs, and other asset-enabling partners within the flexibility market.
* Manage the full lifecycle from first contact to signed partnership agreement
* Build and maintain a high-quality commercial pipeline
* Influence partner decision-makers and strategic direction
* Identify and develop new business opportunities that strengthen the Distributed Assets portfolio
* Collaborate closely with internal teams (Product, Tech, Partner Success, Trading) to ensure smooth onboarding and long-term success
* Represent Flower externally and position our flexibility offering in the market


**Who You Are**
* An experienced commercial professional with 8+ years in business development, partnerships, or B2B sales
* Relevant academic background, such as a degree in engineering, economics, business, or a related field.
* Skilled in managing complex stakeholder landscapes and long commercial cycles
* Able to translate strategic goals into concrete commercial actions
* Confident engaging with senior decision-makers on both strategic and operational topics
* Experience in the energy sector, utilities, or related industries is a strong advantage
* Fluent in both Swedish and English, with strong written and verbal communication skills.


**📍 Location**
 Our beautiful office is located in the heart of Södermalm just a short walk from Slussen subway station. We encourage in-office collaboration but support a hybrid work model.
   

  

**✉️ Apply**
 Our corporate language is English, as we have over 30 nationalities in the office. We therefore appreciate it if you could submit your CV in English.
   

  

 We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

*We kindly but firmly decline any engagement in recruitment assistance for our hiring processes. This includes partnership offers or the sale of recruitment tools.*

title: Senior Software Engineer – Central Technology | Candy Crush Soda Saga
description:
**Craft:**

**Job Description:**
 Want to create the world’s best mobile games?
   

  

 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Software Engineer** 
 to join our Kingdom. Our games are adored by hundreds of millions of people, and you’ll be helping build them. As well as contribute to the engine, systems and platforms that make them play brilliantly on any platform.

title: Principal AI Solution Engineer
description:
**Craft:**
 Data, Analytics & Strategy
   

  

**Job Description:**
****Principal AI Solutions Engineer****
 The ACE team (AI Center of Excellence at King) accelerates King’s AI transformation by enabling teams to safely and productively adopt AI in daily work. We do this through shared practices, education, enablement, and by partnering with game studios, Shared Tech, and support functions to integrate AI tools into King’s workflows.
   

  

 As third‑party AI tools (LLMs, generative models, agentic tooling) have rapidly evolved, we expanded AI/ML with the AI Discovery & Enablement team. This team helps King evaluate and apply new technologies and commercial tools (COTS) that improve productivity and speed up routes to better player experiences, primarily by making AI normal across engineering workflows.
   

  

 We are now looking for a
 **Principal AI Solutions Engineer** 
 to support the AI Discovery & Enablement team by delivering high‑leverage, production‑ready integrations and adoption mechanisms across King.
   

  

****Your role within the Kingdom****
 We’re looking for someone who is excited by the scale of King and brings ambitious, creative thinking to unlock step-change improvements; not just incremental optimizations.
   

  

 As Principal AI Solutions Engineer, you are a hands-on technical expert and strategic integrator focused on adoption-first AI enablement. You will work with engineering leaders, across business units, and tool owners to translate AI opportunities into concrete integration points across the SDLC and King’s “Royal Roads” (standards, patterns, and preferred paths).
   

  

 This role requires strong engineering credibility: you can participate in architecture discussions, design integrations that are reliable and supportable, and ship the small number of solutions that compound adoption across many teams.
   

  

 You will also contribute to a limited number of partnership-led, time‑boxed PoCs to demonstrate value and potential of opportunities and ensure learnings are captured and handed off appropriately.
   

  

****Key responsibilities:****
****AI adoption & workflow integration (Primary focus)****
* Design, build, and ship production‑ready AI integrations that improve productivity (e.g., in developer workflows, PR/code review assistance, testing support, documentation workflows, developer enablement experiences) aligned with King’s standards and “Royal Roads.”
* Participate in architecture discussions and design reviews. Translate AI possibilities into concrete integration points, reference implementations, and clear trade‑offs.
* Partake in team efforts - Collaborate with the AI Discovery Engineer, the AI User Experience Researcher and the rest of the team to align development and integration efforts with King's AI productivity and enablement strategy.
* Critical Thinking & Contextual Awareness - Understand not just the “what” and “how” of AI integration, but also the “why.” Connect day-to-day implementation details with the larger organizational strategy, ensuring that the work you do meaningfully advances King’s AI-first transformation.


**Partnership PoCs**
* Contribute to a small number of partnership-led PoCs to validate what’s possible, capture learnings, and inform next steps for the owning teams. When a PoC transitions toward productization, support a clear handoff rather than becoming the long‑term owner.


**Ways of working**
* Proactive Collaboration & Partner Alignment - Maintain close alignment with internal teams; game studios, Shared Tech, and support functions - by identifying needs, gathering feedback, and fostering consensus. Communicate clearly and proactively to ensure efforts align with the company’s AI strategy and productivity goals.
* Documentation and Handover - Create clear and comprehensive documentation for solutions, ensuring smooth handovers of proofs-of-concept (POC) to other teams for long-term maintenance and promoting knowledge-sharing across the organization


**Experience**
**Skills to Create Thrills**
* Proven experience in a development-focused role, preferably within a Game development and AI-specific context.
* Proven experience in a senior/principal development role delivering developer productivity tooling, platform integrations, or workflow automation in a complex organization.
* Proven experience integrating LLM-based tools (e.g., GPT‑class models) and/or agentic workflows into real production environments with appropriate evaluation, monitoring, and guardrails.
* Experience building and operating integrations on cloud infrastructure (GCP preferred), including CI/CD and modern deployment practices (containers/Kubernetes).
* Experience working cross‑functionally with engineering leaders, platform teams, and product stakeholders to ship solutions that are adopted (not just delivered).


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Deep knowledge of game development processes, challenges, and support functions, particularly how AI can fit into production lifecycles, from prototyping to live operations, is highly valuable.
* Strong software engineering fundamentals and coding proficiency; ability to architect and implement end‑to‑end integrations that solve real workflow problems. (Python and/or similar languages common in AI workflows are highly desirable.)
* Strong understanding of modern software delivery workflows (code review, CI/CD, testing, release practices) and where AI can be embedded to improve cycle time and quality.
* Practical understanding of reliability, observability, security/privacy considerations, and cost controls for AI-enabled systems and vendor tooling.
* Strong communication skills: able to explain technical trade‑offs to technical and non‑technical audiences, and drive alignment across multiple partner teams.


**Key Attributes**
* Independently prioritize, handle ambiguity, and drive work forward through partner alignment and clear trade‑offs.
* Strong sense of ownership and accountability, with an ability to define “done” and establish operational handoffs.
* Collaborative and proactive; builds relationships with studios, Shared Tech, and champions to scale adoption.
* Curious and pragmatic: comfortable learning new tools quickly, but focused on what compounds adoption and creates durable value.
* Bold and opportunity-driven: energized by working at King scale, you think beyond obvious solutions and proactively propose ambitious, high-leverage ideas while grounding them in practical delivery and measurable impact.


**Nice to Have**
* Familiarity with GCP-native AI services (e.g., Vertex AI) or enterprise integration patterns for vendor tooling (auth/audit/data boundaries).
* Experience with modern ML frameworks (PyTorch/TensorFlow) when useful for evaluation or prototyping, but not required for the core role.
* Deep familiarity with game development pipelines and production constraints.
* Familiarity with ethical AI considerations or regulatory requirements.


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Quantexa Developer (f/m/x)
description:

****Your tasks****

* Strong programming skills in Scala
* Solid experience with Apache Spark and Hadoop ecosystem, as well as Unix shell scripting, SQL, and version control tools (GIT)

title: Senior ServiceNow-utvecklare
description:
**Jobbeskrivning**
**Om oss:**
 Sopra Steria är Europas ledande konsultföretag inom ServiceNow och digital transformation. Vi hjälper företag och organisationer att effektivisera sina verksamheter genom innovativa teknologilösningar. Med fler än 4000 ServiceNow-experter besitter vi marknadens största och mest framstående ServiceNow-team där du får möjligheten att arbeta med de mest spännande projekten samt utvecklas i en dynamisk och framåtlutad arbetsmiljö. Nu tar vi nästa stora kliv och satsar ännu hårdare på vår ledande position inom ServiceNow. Hos oss får du chansen att vara med och driva utvecklingen framåt, forma framtidens lösningar och göra verklig skillnad. Vill du vara en del av vårt ledande team?
   

  

**Om rollen:**
 I rollen som Senior Utvecklare inom ServiceNow kommer du att vara en nyckelspelare i att utveckla och implementera lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen för våra kunder. Du säkerställer att tekniska lösningar håller hög kvalitet, är hållbara och anpassade efter kundens verksamhet. Som Elite Partner för ServiceNow har vi en av Skandinaviens största och mest kvalificerade konsultgrupper med närmare 500 dedikerade experter. Vi söker nu en erfaren Senior Utvecklare som kan ta en strategisk och operativ roll i våra teamleveranser.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga uppgifter:**
* Utveckla och konfigurera lösningar på ServiceNow-plattformen.
* Säkerställa teknisk kvalitet och bästa praxis i lösningarna.
* Fungera som rådgivare till kunder kring tekniska lösningar och plattformsutveckling.
* Leda tekniska workshops och kravinsamling med kunder.
* Samarbeta med processledare och andra roller för att säkerställa helhetslösningar.
* Analysera och optimera befintliga lösningar samt identifiera förbättringsområden.


**För att vara framgångsrik i rollen tror vi att du har:**
* Flerårig erfarenhet av utveckling och implementation inom ServiceNow.
* Gedigen kunskap i JavaScript samt god förståelse för webbteknologier som HTML och CSS.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med moduler som ITSM, ITOM, HR eller SecOps.
* Förmåga att leda tekniska dialoger och workshops med kund.
* Relevant akademisk utbildning inom IT eller motsvarande.
* Flytande svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Vi erbjuder:**
* En spännande arbetsmiljö hos Europas ledande ServiceNow-konsultbolag.
* Möjlighet att arbeta med innovativa lösningar och den senaste tekniken.
* Kompetensutveckling genom certifieringar, utbildningar och mentorskap.
* Hybrid arbetsmodell samt konkurrenskraftiga villkor och förmåner.


**Om ServiceNow-teamet på Sopra Steria:**
 Sopra Steria är Nordens ledande expert inom ServiceNow – vi har den största och mest specialiserade kompetensen på marknaden. Vårt starka och sammansvetsade team levererar omfattande och högkvalitativa lösningar, där flera av våra erfarna ServiceNow-konsulter samarbetar för att maximera värdet för våra kunder. Vi drivs av innovation, samarbete och kunskapsutbyte – tillsammans sätter vi nya standarder och skapar framtidens digitala lösningar. Vill du arbeta med de bästa? Då är Sopra Steria platsen för dig.
   

  

**Om Sopra Steria:**
 Sopra Steria är en av Europas ledande aktörer inom digital transformation, med över 60 000 medarbetare i mer än 30 länder globalt. Vi driver innovation och hjälper företag och organisationer att effektivisera, utvecklas och skapa långsiktigt värde genom banbrytande teknologilösningar.
   

  

 Hos oss arbetar de främsta experterna inom sina områden i en dynamisk och framtidsorienterad miljö där samarbete, nytänkande och teknisk spetskompetens står i centrum.
   

  

**Vill du veta mer om oss? Läs här: Om oss | Sopra Steria**
**Ansökan:**
 Om du är redo att ta nästa steg i din karriär och vara en del av en framstående arbetsplats, ansök genom att ladda upp ditt CV. Kontakta gärna ansvarig rekryterare, Teodor Nellvik (teodor.nellvik@soprasteria.com) eller Business Owner Mikael Kroglund (mikael.kroglund@soprasteria.com) för eventuella frågor om tjänsten.
   

  

 På Sopra Steria ställer vi höga krav på både kompetens och säkerhetsmedvetenhet hos våra medarbetare. Innan en eventuell anställning kommer du därför att genomgå en bakgrundskontroll, och vid intervju behöver du kunna uppvisa giltig legitimation.
   

  

**Välkommen till Sopra Steria – där din kompetens formar framtidens digitala lösningar!**
**Ytterligare information**
 Sopra Steria är ett ledande internationellt konsultbolag inom digital transformation. Vi bygger samhället genom designdriven innovation, teknisk utveckling med kunskap om marknadens ledande plattformar och driftlösningar (managed services). Med modern teknologi och en gedigen affärsförståelse är vi en helhetspartner för våra kunder och deras digitala transformationsresa. Enligt Great Place To Work är vi en av Sveriges bästa arbetsplatser, vi har tilldelats utmärkelsen Karriärföretag flera år i rad och Gartner har listat oss som ett topp 5 bolag inom digital transformation.

title: Utvecklare inom Identitet och Access Management (IAM)
description:
Svenska kraftnät är en nyckelaktör i energiomställningen. Vår IT-division växer för att möjliggöra en fördubblad elproduktion och en fossilfri framtid. Med ny teknik ökar vi både infrastrukturens kapacitet och utvecklingstakten inom digitalisering och processer.
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
 Som utvecklare inom identitets- och åtkomsthantering (IAM) arbetar du med att utveckla, konfigurera och vidareutveckla Svenska kraftnäts IAM-plattform, baserad på lösningar från bland annat One Identity och Microsoft. Du arbetar nära verksamheten för att fånga behov och omsätta dessa till effektiva och säkra tekniska lösningar.
   

  

 Rollen innebär ett varierat arbete där du kombinerar utveckling, förvaltning och förbättringsarbete i en komplex och föränderlig IT-miljö, i nära samarbete med både team och andra delar av organisationen.
   

  

**Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:**
* Utveckla och konfigurera IAM-lösningen
* Hantera incidenter och säkerställa stabil drift
* Uppgradera och implementera nya lösningar
* Vidareutveckla IAM-processer
* Omsätta verksamhetens krav till tekniska lösningar
* Delta i både projekt och löpande förvaltningsarbete


 Du rapporterar till enhetschefen för Digital arbetsplats.
   

  

 Du får en viktig roll i att vidareutveckla Svenska kraftnäts IAM-förmåga och bidra till en säker och modern digital arbetsplats. Enheten ansvarar för bland annat klientplattformar, IAM, katalogtjänster och digitala samarbetsverktyg.
   

  

**Om dig**
 Vi söker dig som har ett stort intresse för IT och som är lösningsorienterad i ditt arbetssätt. Du är van att samarbeta nära verksamheten och har en god förmåga att omsätta behov till tekniska lösningar. Din samarbetsförmåga är stark och du kommunicerar på ett tydligt, lyhört och konstruktivt sätt, vilket är avgörande i rollen.
   

  

 För att trivas i rollen ser vi att du är ansvarstagande och har förmåga att se helheten i ditt arbete. Du har lätt för att samarbeta med andra och bygger goda relationer i organisationen.
