 If you have questions, please contact Talent Acquisition Partner, Lovisa Malmberg, lovisa.malmberg@nordnet.se
   

  

 Please apply today by using the button below – we will start interviewing immediately. Please note that we do only accept applications through our recruitment system, hence no email applications will be considered.
   

  

 We want to inform you that Nordnet conducts credit and background checks on the final candidate.
   

  

 We look forward to receiving your application.

title: Junior QA Engineer
description:
The Mission
   

  

 Airmee is one of Europe’s fastest-growing logistics startups, and our tech is what makes us different. We don’t just move parcels; we optimize cities. As a Junior QA Engineer, you will be the ultimate gatekeeper of our platform. You’ll ensure that when a courier in Stockholm or Malmö opens our app, it works flawlessly—regardless of GPS drift, poor connectivity, or hardware quirks.
   

  

 This isn't a "sit-at-a-desk-and-click" role. You will be deeply involved in the lifecycle of our products, testing everything from complex routing logic in our Admin Dashboard to real-time verification features in our mobile apps.
   

  

 The Role
   

  

 We are looking for someone who loves the rigors of manual testing. You will work alongside our mobile (iOS/Android) and full-stack teams to catch bugs before they ever reach a courier’s device.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Real-World Testing: Execute manual tests that simulate a courier’s day. You’ll test how our apps handle barcode scanners, camera permissions, and complex logistics flows.
* Proactive Bug Hunting: You won’t just wait for a feature to be finished. You’ll review requirements in Jira and help write test cases before developers start coding, identifying edge cases early.
* Bug Reporting with Precision: When you find a bug, you don’t just say "it's broken." You provide logs, reproduction steps, and screenshots that make it easy for our developers to fix it fast.
* Cross-Platform Validation: Ensure our features work perfectly across both iOS and Android, preventing critical regressions.


 Who You Are
   

  

* Detail-Obsessed: You’re the person who spots a UI misalignment or a logic error that everyone else missed.
* A "Pessimistic Optimist": You hope the code works, but you test it as if it’s definitely going to break.
* Tech-Curious: You have some experience with manual testing (Web/Mobile) and are familiar with tools like Jira, Postman, or Chrome DevTools.
* Logistics Enthusiast: You’re interested in how the "magic" of same-day delivery happens—from the retailer through the warehouses to the final doorstep.
* A Great Communicator: You are comfortable speaking up and pushing back on a release if the quality standards aren't met. We value "Shift-Left" quality where your input is heard early.


**Must-Have**
 Skills & Experience
   

  

* A basic understanding of the software development lifecycle (SDLC).
* Experience writing clear, logical test plans or user stories.
* Hands-on experience using real iOS and Android devices for testing.
* Excellent communication skills in English (our working language)


 Nice-to-Have (The "Bonus" Skills):
   

  

* Experience testing hardware integrations (like Bluetooth scanners).
* Basic knowledge of API testing.


 Practicalities
   

  

 Location: Stockholm (Hybrid)
   

  

 Department: Tech / Engineering
   

  

 Reports to: Senior QA Engineer

title: Information Security Lead
description:
As an Information Security Lead at Nordiska, you’ll shape our security strategy, guide architecture decisions, and ensure secure delivery across the organization - where banking meets tech. You’ll play a key role in strengthening our security posture in an increasingly AI-driven environment, ensuring resilience, trust, and compliance at scale.
   

  

**Bank at core, innovation at heart**
 Nordiska is a bank offering a wide range of financial services, allowing us to tailor solutions to each customer while simultaneously enabling them to gain access to advanced financial technology. Part of our offering is our Embedded platform, enabling enterprise partners across Europe to seamlessly integrate financial services into their product offerings. We also provide corporate and real estate financing, as well as sustainable savings with a government-backed deposit guarantee.
   

  

 To meet future demands, we continuously scale our modern technology platform, expand partner integrations, and accelerate product innovation to help shape the future of financial services.
   

  

**Working at Nordiska**
 Since our founding, we have been dedicated to making a difference and driving innovation. We work towards an ambitious vision and goals, backed up by our history of successfully delivering high-quality results and sustainable growth.
   

  

 Historically and going forward, the people working at Nordiska are what enables our success. We balance our professional environment with an entrepreneurial mindset, always acting with honesty and responsibility, to build long-term trust among customers, partners and employees.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As we continue scaling with embedded finance partners on a European level, we’re looking for an Information Security Lead to take end-to-end ownership of information security and cybersecurity.
   

  

 At Nordiska, security is more than compliance; it’s a core enabler of growth and trust. As our embedded platform capabilities expand, so do partner expectations and the need for clear security ownership, strong execution and risk management. In this role, you will own Nordiska’s security posture and drive initiatives that strengthen resilience, governance, and operational security. You will ensure compliance with evolving requirements and frameworks, while embedding security into product development and day-to-day operations in close collaboration with Risk, Tech and Legal. This is a hands-on, operational leader role with accountability for both strategy and implementation. You will also serve as Nordiska’s primary security representative in external engagements - working with regulators, auditors, and partners - leading compliance efforts and ensuring Nordiska not only meets, but consistently raises the bar on security, governance and risk management.
   

  

**In the role, you will:**
**As Information Security Lead some of your key responsibilities are:**
* Lead Nordiska’s information security and cybersecurity work end-to-end, aligned with business priorities, partner expectations and regulatory requirements.
* Lead and maintain the ICT security framework, including governance, implementation, and cross-functional coordination, while leading third-party security risk management through due diligence, contractual requirements, and ongoing monitoring of vendors and service providers.
* Measure, report, and continuously strengthen Nordiska’s security posture through risk-based prioritization, clear metrics, and structured remediation, while owning incident management and regulatory reporting with well-defined procedures, timely escalation, and compliant communication with relevant authorities.
* Establish and maintain security governance and controls, embedding regulatory and industry requirements into policies, processes and steering documentation.
* Lead security assurance and stakeholder management, including ISO work, internal/external/regulatory audits and assessments and advising management and the Board on risks and mitigations.


**Your Professional Profile**
* Proactive and accountable - you take ownership beyond “tech security” and ensure security and compliance are embedded across the business.
* Structured and execution-oriented - you thrive in building, running and continuously improving compliance processes, not just overseeing them at a distance.
* Independent and self-sufficient - you can drive progress without formal line management, leading through influence in cross-functional initiatives.
* Collaborative and influential – you create alignment across departments and communicate risks, trade-offs, and priorities effectively across all levels of the organization.


**We believe that you have:**
* 7+ years of experience in information security/cybersecurity, with at least 2 years in leading roles in technology or infrastructure-intensive environments.
* Extensive experience in information security, cyber risk management and regulatory oversight, ideally within fintech, banking, or other highly regulated environments.
* A strong understanding of modern cybersecurity principles and technical security concepts.
* Hands-on experience driving audits, assessments and security programs, including regulatory reviews, risk assessments and remediation follow-up.
* Solid knowledge of key regulatory frameworks and standards such as DORA, ISO 27001, and GDPR, and how to translate requirements into practical controls.
* Excellent communication skills in both English and Swedish, with experience presenting to senior stakeholders and non-technical audiences.
* Experience from a tech-driven organization (preferred), where security enables delivery, scale and partner trust.


**Application**
 If you’re looking to join a growth-driven environment that pairs innovation with profitability and reliability, welcome to Nordiska. We look forward to receiving your application.
   

  

 We review and interview continuously, with background checks as part of the final stage of our process. For questions about the role and or more information, you are warmly welcome to contact Ida Garamvölgyi at ida.garamvolgyi@nordiska.com or +46704-385 325

title: VP Group IT & Tech Procurement
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **VP Group IT & Tech Procurement** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 As the new VP of Group IT & Tech Procurement, you will take full ownership and responsibility of an efficient development of the internal IT environment, technical tools & systems - ensuring that Viaplay Group employees are equipped with the tools necessary to maximize productivity, as well as overseeing the portfolio of vendor agreements and vendor relations across the entire Product, Data & Tech organization. You will bring some fresh energy and help figure out how AI can actually improve day-to-day operations.
   

  

 You will lead a talented, distributed team of approx 13 talented people across Sweden, Denmark, and the UK. You will be the architect behind securing a smart IT system landscape and integrations which maximizes the productivity of their employees, whilst also securing a proactive procurement strategy and stakeholder management that ensures that they stay ahead of the curve.
   

  

 You’ll report directly to the EVP, CTO & CPO and join the PD&T leadership team that covers everything from Engineering and Data to Product and Monetization.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Leading Leaders: Lead and motivate skilled and experienced managers using a context-driven and transformational leadership style.
* Group IT: Spanning across IT Operations, Security and Productivity, your responsibility is to drive transformation in order to enable the organization to become even more productive, whilst maintaining a cost efficient platform.
* Tools and systems: Own the toolkit (Office IT, Teams, Jira, Airtable, etc.) and make sure these tools actually help people work better, not just sit there.
* Tech Procurement: Drive a large agreement portfolio, managing high-value partnerships with the likes of Cloud platform vendors, SAAS vendors, CDNs, satellite providers etc.
* Innovation & AI: Act as a "mind opener." We want you to challenge the "we've always done it this way" mentality and show how AI and new tech can simplify our lives.
* Smart Governance and stakeholder management: Find that sweet spot where they have the right guard rails in place without IT becoming a "blocker" for the rest of the business.


**What We’re Looking For**
 We’re looking for someone open minded, inquisitive and self-driven. You’ve got the seniority to command a room but the pragmatism to keep things simple. You thrive in an environment where strategies might shift, and you’re comfortable pivoting when they do.
   

  

**We Think You Have**
* A strong leadership presence with the ability to inspire, develop, and guide teams through change. Comfortable being strategic as well as handson and an accomplished leader of leaders.
* Solid experience from running system integration projects, running internal IT operations and procurement and negotiation. Ideally from several companies, giving you a broad perspective and a sense of what good looks like.
* A pragmatic mindset to prioritize delivery and customer experience over rigid bureaucracy.
* A collaborative spirit, eager to share knowledge and expertise across teams and departments.


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


 If you’re ready to lead a passionate, talented team in an exciting and fast-paced industry, we’d love to hear from you.
   

  

***Viaplay is collaborating with Safemind as a recruitment partner.***

title: Future Opportunities
description:
At Broadridge, we've built a culture where the highest goal is to empower others to accomplish more. If you’re passionate about developing your career, while helping others along the way, come join the Broadridge team.
   

  

 Our Stockholm office is an important part of our International organisation, and we are always interested in connecting with talented individuals for future opportunities.
   

  

 This is not a live vacancy for a specific role, but it is an opportunity to express interest in future openings within our Stockholm team.
   

  

 We regularly hire across a range of functions, including Engineering, Product Management, Customer Support, Sales, and Business Operations. We welcome applications from candidates with relevant functional expertise, strong professional experience, and a proactive, collaborative approach.
   

  

 If you are interested in joining Broadridge in Stockholm, we encourage you to submit your application. If your background matches a future opportunity, a member of our Recruitment team may contact you.
   

  

 We are dedicated to fostering a collaborative, engaging, and inclusive environment and are committed to providing a workplace that empowers associates to be authentic and bring their best to work. We believe that associates do their best when they feel safe, understood, and valued, and we work diligently and collaboratively to ensure Broadridge is a company—and ultimately a community—that recognizes and celebrates everyone’s unique perspective.
   

  

**Use of AI in Hiring**
 As part of the recruiting process, Broadridge may use technology, including artificial intelligence (AI)-based tools, to help review and evaluate applications. These tools are used only to support our recruiters and hiring managers, and all employment decisions include human review to ensure fairness, accuracy, and compliance with applicable laws. Please note that honesty and transparency are critical to our hiring process. Any attempt to falsify, misrepresent, or disguise information in an application, resume, assessment, or interview will result in disqualification from consideration.

title: Server- & virtualiseringstekniker
description:
Ta en nyckelroll som senior IT-tekniker med ansvar för avancerade Windows- och VMware-miljöer. Här får du arbeta nära verksamheten, lösa komplexa problem och bidra till en säkerhetsinriktad IT‑miljö.
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifter:**
 Du kommer ha stort ansvar för underhåll och administration av Windows‑servrar och klienter samt installation, konfiguration och förvaltning av VMware‑miljöer. Arbetet omfattar att felsöka och lösa tekniska problem kopplade till Windows och VMware, samt att dokumentera systemkonfigurationer och förändringar. Du kommer samarbeta nära andra avdelningar för att säkerställa god integration mellan IT‑system, och deltar även i projekt och initiativ som syftar till att vidareutveckla och förbättra IT‑infrastrukturen. Stort fokus kommer ligga på säkerhetstänk och att följa satta säkerhetsföreskrifter.
   

  

**Kompetenskrav:**
* Minst 5 års erfarenhet av arbete med Windows-servrar och klienter.
* Djupgående kunskaper inom VMware, inklusive installation, konfiguration och administration.
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i säkerhetsfokuserade miljöer.
* God förståelse för nätverksprotokoll och säkerhetsprinciper.
* Förmåga att arbeta självständigt och i team.
* Utmärkta problemlösningsförmågor och analytiska färdigheter.
* God kommunikationsförmåga på svenska och engelska.


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Certifieringar inom Windows Server och VMware (t.ex. MCSE, VCP).
* Erfarenhet av att arbeta i säkerhetskänsliga .
* Kunskap om andra virtualiseringsplattformar och molntjänster.


 Personliga egenskaper:
   

  

* Noggrann och detaljorienterad.
* Hög integritet och pålitlighet.
* Förmåga att hantera stress och arbeta under press.
* Flexibel och anpassningsbar till förändringar.


**💚 Humanit**
 Humanit handlar om att göra saker lite annorlunda, att på riktigt sätta våra anställda i fokus. Vi växer tillsammans och värdesätter engagemang och ambition. För oss är det viktigt att du får chansen att vara med och påverka vägen framåt.
   

  

 I utbyte erbjuder vi kompetens- och karriärutveckling genom varierande och utmanande uppdrag. Vi är inte branschinriktade och kan därför erbjuda en fantastisk variation bland uppdragen för dig som konsult. Självklart ser vi till att du får rätt utbildning och vi är väl medvetna om att det är det livslånga lärandet som bygger vår framgång.
   

  

 Tillsammans skapar vi framtiden 🚀
   

  

* Tillsvidareanställning med fast månadslön
* Kollektivavtal
* Vi tillämpar sex månaders provanställning, inklusive maxat friskvårdsbidrag
* Utvecklingsplan
* Hälsoförsäkring + pension
* Förskottssemester


**Start** 
 : Omgående med hänsyn till uppsägningstid och när säkerhetskontroll är genomförd. Uppdraget är på heltid och är tillsvidare.
   

  

**Plats** 
 : Stockholm, Östhammar eller Väröbacka
   

  

**Ansökan** 
 : Vi rekryterar löpande. Så skicka in din ansökan redan idag!
   

  

***Sveriges 7:e bästa arbetsplats 2026!***
*Humanit arbetar tillsammans med Great Place To Work för att vi skall bli Sveriges bästa arbetsplats.*
**Och förresten:**
*Som en aktiv del i ett samhälle med kulturell och social mångfald är Humanit’s ambition att präglas av inkludering och bred representation, samt vara en arbetsplats med lika möjligheter för alla. Humanit anställer, bibehåller, befordrar och i övrigt behandlar alla medarbetare och kandidater efter erfarenhet, kvalifikationer och kompetens, oavsett kön, religion, ursprung, ålder, sexuell läggning, könsidentitet eller funktionsvariationer.*

title: Graphic Designer
description:
At Photowall, we create custom-made wallpapers and wall murals for customers all over the world. We’re a growing e-commerce company, with a current presence in over 30 markets, and we’re continuing to expand - both in new markets and with new products.
   

  

 We work in a fast-paced environment where things move quickly, ideas are tested, and everyone is encouraged to take ownership. If you want to develop, try new things, and be part of a team that gets things done - you’ll fit right in.
   

  

**About The Role**
 As a Graphic Designer, you will be responsible for producing high-quality digital assets across our channels - from e-commerce and CRM to campaigns and social media. This is a hands-on, production-heavy role where speed, precision, and a strong eye for detail are key. You will also create print and digital material for events, fairs, and press-related activities, ensuring brand consistency across all outputs.
   

  

 You’ll work closely with teams across marketing, e-commerce, and brand to ensure that everything we create is consistent, on-brand, and built to perform. You’ll balance creativity with structure, working within brand guidelines while continuously finding ways to improve how we create, adapt, and scale content.
   

  

 This is a high-output role where you’ll create and adapt assets daily across multiple markets and channels, collaborating closely with cross-functional teams.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and produce high-quality assets with strong typography, layout, and visual hierarchy for production across all channels
* Develop print and digital material for events, fairs, and PR
* Retouch imagery to a high and consistent standard
* Edit video content and create motion assets for social and marketing use
* Support content creation, photoshoots, and campaign production when needed
* Collaborate closely with stakeholders across teams to ensure brand consistency and performance-driven output
* Explore and apply AI tools for image creation and design to enhance creative output and efficiency


**Requirements**
* 5+ years of experience in graphic design
* Formal design education or equivalent professional experience
* Experience working cross-functionally with multiple stakeholders – confident in your ability to explain ideas clearly to both design and non-design stakeholders
* Curiosity for AI tools and new ways of working (a strong plus if included in portfolio)
* A strong passion for interior design
* Fluent in English


**Nice to have**
* Experience from a fast-paced, production-heavy international e-commerce environment is a strong plus
* Experience using AI tools for image creation and design is a strong plus (please include examples in your portfolio)
* Experience from campaign production or photoshoots


 Please note that a portfolio (website, PDF, or both) must be included with your application. Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.
   

  

**Why Photowall?**
 At Photowall, we’re a close-knit team that values collaboration and creativity. You’ll work in a fast-paced environment with a high output of creative assets, where ideas are quickly tested and brought to life across multiple markets.
   

  

 You’ll collaborate closely with teams across marketing and e-commerce and have real impact on how our brand shows up globally. We value ownership, speed, and continuous improvement - and give you the space to develop your craft while doing it.
   

  

 As part of the Network of Design (NOD), we continue to push our creative direction forward and explore new ways of working.
   

  

 Apply today and be part of how we create and scale design at Photowall

title: Project Manager
description:
**Project Manager — Structured Cabling & IT Infrastructure | Hyperscale Data Centre | Major Tech Client** 




 📍 EU-based | Permanent / Rotational working
 



 If you've delivered structured cabling or IT infrastructure projects inside a hyperscale data centre — and specifically have hands-on experience within a
 **Microsoft data centre environment** 
 — this is a role worth pausing your scroll for.
 



  





 We're representing a well-established ICT infrastructure contractor with an impressive footprint across European data centre and critical infrastructure projects. They work with some of the world's largest technology and life sciences organisations — and right now, they need an experienced PM to take ownership of delivery on a flagship hyperscale programme.
 



  





 This is a client-facing, site-based role with genuine autonomy. You'll be driving day-to-day delivery, managing multi-disciplinary teams, and keeping senior stakeholders across the client and contractor sides fully aligned. The position can be structured as a local weekday role or on a rotational basis for the right candidate.
 



  





**What you'll be doing:** 




 🔹 Leading end-to-end delivery across a large-scale IT infrastructure and structured cabling programme
 



 🔹 Owning site operations — programme, cost, scope, and quality
 



 🔹 Acting as the primary point of contact for client and stakeholder management
 



 🔹 Driving risk identification, mitigation planning, and commercial performance
 



 🔹 Leading and developing your on-site team through the full project lifecycle
 



  





**What we're looking for:** 




 ✅
 **Microsoft** 
 data centre experience is essential — candidates without this will not be considered ✅ A solid track record in PM roles within structured cabling, fibre optic, or IT network infrastructure
 



 ✅ Technical fluency in data centre environments — you know what you're managing, not just how to manage it
 



 ✅ Strong client-facing skills and the confidence to lead in a high-pressure, complex setting
 



 ✅ Right to work in the EU
 



 ✅ Relevant site safety accreditation
 



  





 This kind of hyperscale programme experience doesn't come around often. If you're currently working in a similar environment and open to hearing more — or know someone who is — we'd love to have a confidential conversation.
 



  





 📩 Apply via the link, or message us directly to discuss in confidence. The hiring company will not be disclosed at initial enquiry stage.
 



  





 #DataCentre #StructuredCabling #ProjectManagement #ITInfrastructure #HyperscaleDataCentre #FibreOptic #EUJobs #Recruitment #DataCentreJobs #ICT

title: System Specialist
description:
At Tele2 we work hard to fulfill our commitment to lead in sustainability, being named a climate leader in Europe by The Financial Times. Sweden’s most sustainable company and ranked 37th globally by Time Magazine and Statista on their inaugural World’s Most Sustainable Companies list, featuring 500 companies from more than 30 countries. We keep reaching new goals as we are bound to shift to a circular economy, and we help our customers to do this too.
   

  

 Our Values; Be Brave, Take Action, Make it Simple and Act Cost-efficient.
   

  

**NÅGRA ORD FRÅN REKRYTERANDE CHEF**
*Så kul att du är nyfiken tjänsten i mitt Team. Hos oss kommer du att få arbeta med uppgifter som har stor betydelse för många människor i vårt land.*
*Dina kollegor kommer att finnas över hela Sverige, från norr till söder.*
*De är ett gäng systemspecialister med lång erfarenhet, hög kompetens och framför allt väldigt trevliga kollegor som likt företaget präglas av flexibilitet, prestigelöshet och ett högt engagemang! Jag ser fram emot att läsa din ansökan!*
 På Tele2 händer det ständigt nya saker och vi står nu inför en intressant resa framåt. Vi har Sveriges mest expansiva nät och flera av Sveriges största organisationer som kunder. Vi skräddarsyr telefonilösningar med plattformar från ledande leverantörer till våra företagskunder. Artvise är en av våra prioriterade lösningar för contact-center, ärendehantering och E-tjänster. Det är en dynamisk miljö och vi har roligt på vägen, men vi klarar det inte själva. Därför söker vi nu en systemspecialist till vårt Artvise team!
   

  

**ROLLEN:**
 Som specialist kliver du raka vägen in i ett av våra viktigaste team. Tillsammans ansvarar ni för samhällsbärande funktioner, som ligger i framkant när det gäller systemintegration inom tele- och datakommunikation med Artvise som plattform. Du kommer att arbeta med kunden i centrum och tillsammans med Sveriges skickligaste specialister inom området. Låter det spännande? Läs vidare!
   

  

**Arbetsuppgifterna innefattar att:**
* Ingå i tekniska/konsultativa projekt
* Arbeta med utveckling och konsulttjänster kring kundens lösning i nära kundkontakt.
* Delta i eller bedriva förstudier där man behöver förstå kundernas behov för att kunna erbjuda relevanta lösningar.
* Supportera i felsökning och felavhjälpning.


 Tjänsten utgår i förstahand från Kista, Malmö eller Göteborg. Hybrid-/distansarbete till viss grad. Resor förekommer inom landet. Beredskapsarbete ingår i tjänsten.
   

  

**VEM DU ÄR:**
 För att trivas i rollen bör du ha intresse och förmåga att utveckla och förvalta våra kundrelationer. Därför känner du stort engagemang för det du gör och har en naturlig vana att jobba med service och support. Våra kunder finns inom offentlig sektor, olika företagssegment och branscher, vilket ger en stor variation i arbetet men som även kräver förmåga att prioritera, analysera samt en lyhördhet och förståelse för olika kundbehov. Att du vill utveckla och utvecklas med ditt arbete ser vi som en självklarhet. Likaså en nyfikenhet och intresse för telefoni och teknik.
   

  

**Vidare ser vi att du har:**
* Eftergymnasial utbildning inom, eller motsvarande erfarenhet av tele-/datakom och systemutveckling.
* Erfarenhet av systemintegration med contact-center och/eller ärendehanteringssystem.
* Förståelse för tex Rest, Json, .Net, Xml
* Kunskap inom nätverk, SIP och telekom
* Kunskap inom Microsoft Server, VM Ware och SQL.
* Tidigare erfarenhet av integrationsprojekt rörande AI är meriterande.
* Meriterande att ha tidigare erfarenhet av ärendehanteringssystem eller E-tjänster
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Benefits**
 Pension and health care
   

  

 Hybrid and flexible work life balance
   

  

 Career opportunities
   

  

 Parental benefit
   

  

 Employee benefits and Tele2 discounts
   

  

 Inclusive workplace

title: Presales Team Lead
description:
**Role:** 
 Presales Lead – SAP Solutions (S/4HANA & Manufacturing Focus)
 



**Experience (Years):** 
 15+ years
 



**Language requirement:** 
 Swedish & English
 



  





**Tata consultancy Services** 
 is an IT services, consulting and business solutions organization that has been partnering with many of the world’s largest businesses for the past 50 years. We believe innovation and collective knowledge can transform all our futures with greater purpose. We help companies across industries achieve their strategic goals and lead their digital transformation programs. With 600,000 experts globally and 18,000+ consultants working for leading Nordic Customers, we have a strong sense of purpose for the ecosystem around us – our employees, partners, customers and society.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




  





 We are seeking a dynamic Presales Lead with 15+ years of experience to drive presales and solutioning activities for SAP-focused engagements, with a particular emphasis on S/4HANA business solutioning in the Manufacturing domain. The ideal candidate will independently manage RFP/RFI responses, craft compelling proposals, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver high-value SAP solutions that address client business needs.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**SAP S/4HANA Solutioning & Presales** 




  




* Lead the creation of business-focused SAP S/4HANA solutions tailored to client requirements, especially for Manufacturing industry clients.
* Respond to RFPs/RFIs with value-driven proposals, focusing on SAP S/4HANA transformation programs, assessments, and cloud solutions.
* Articulate business value and competitive differentiation of SAP S/4HANA solutions, especially in early sales cycle stages.
* Support acquisition of new customer logos and contribute to overall portfolio growth strategy.



  





  





**Manufacturing Domain Expertise** 




  




* Demonstrate deep understanding of manufacturing business processes, industry trends, and challenges.
* Position SAP S/4HANA as a strategic enabler for digital transformation in manufacturing, including automation, supply chain optimization, and production planning.



  





**Functional SAP S/4HANA Modules (Expertise in at least a few of these areas)** 




  




* SAP S/4HANA Finance (FI/CO)
* SAP S/4HANA Sales & Distribution (SD)
* SAP S/4HANA Materials Management (MM)
* SAP S/4HANA Production Planning (PP)
* SAP S/4HANA Plant Maintenance (PM)
* SAP S/4HANA Quality Management (QM)
* SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain (SCM)
* SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing (Discrete & Process)
* SAP S/4HANA Procurement
* SAP S/4HANA Analytics & Reporting



  





**Bid Management** 




  




* Own the end-to-end bid process, including RFP/RFI analysis, response strategy, proposal writing, pricing coordination, and submission timelines.
* Ensure compliance with internal bid governance processes and client requirements.



  





**Stakeholder Coordination** 




  




* Collaborate with sales, delivery, finance, and legal teams to gather inputs and finalize proposals.
* Engage with clients through discussions, presentations, and workshops to support sales and solutioning efforts.



  





**Knowledge Management** 




  




* Maintain a repository of reusable assets, case studies, and templates to accelerate future bids.



  





**Governance & Delivery Support** 




  




* Ensure high levels of customer satisfaction across SAP programs and engagements.
* Provide updates to client senior management and participate in steering committees as needed.



  





**Required Qualifications & Experience** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Business, Computer Science, or related field; MBA preferred.
* 10+ years of experience in presales, solutioning, or bid management roles, with a strong focus on SAP solutions (especially S/4HANA).
* Proven track record of independently managing large and complex RFP/RFI responses for SAP projects.
* Strong understanding of SAP business processes, digital transformation, and cloud/infrastructure domains.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Proficiency in tools like MS Office, SharePoint, and bid management platforms.



  





**Preferred Attributes** 




  




* Experience working with global clients in sectors such as Manufacturing, Telecom, BFSI, or Retail.
* Exposure to AI-led platforms, automation, and hybrid cloud solutions.
* Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
* Ability to work under tight deadlines and manage multiple bids simultaneously.
* Willingness to travel for client workshops or solution presentations.
* Experience in global delivery models and multicultural environments.



  





**Does that sound interesting?** 




  





 You are welcome to submit your application consisting of your CV, personal letter, relevant degrees or certifications details, professional references, etc. We work with ongoing recruitment so send in your application as soon as possible.
 



  





 We look forward to receiving your application via LinkedIn or mail to
 **aswini.ranganathan@tcs.com** 




  





**Privacy Note: https://ibegin.tcs.com/iBegin/privacy-notice**

title: Founding Designer
description:
You'll be the first designer at Stilta. We believe design is more important than ever - especially when you're building AI that professionals stake their reputation on. This is a high-ownership, end-to-end role. Product design, brand identity, website, marketing surfaces - all of it is yours. The current product was built by engineers. It works. Your job is to make it feel like it was built for the people using it.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Define how AI-generated patent analysis looks, feels, and earns trust - a design problem nobody has solved well yet
* Own the entire design surface: product, brand, website, marketing
* Build out the design system and visual language from scratch
* Create assets for social media, investor materials, and marketing


 What we are looking for
   

  

* 3+ years in product design, with strong visual/brand sensibility
* Eye for the small details most people don't notice
* Enjoy being part of a fast-moving environment where you don't have months to iterate
* Portfolio that shows range: product UI, brand, and everything in between
* Plus if you use AI tools as part of how you work

title: Lead D365 system
description:
**Company Description** 




 Swedium Global is a rapidly growing System Engineering and Solution company headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden, delivering innovative industry solutions across Europe. The company offers on-site consulting services and operates dedicated software development centers in Poland, the Czech Republic, India, and Sweden. Known for its commitment to excellence, Swedium Global caters to diverse business needs to support its clients' growth. By combining global reach with reliable services, the company emphasizes fostering long-term partnerships.
 



  





**Swedium Global** 
  is looking for 
 **Implementation Manager / IT Project Leader to lead D365 system** 
  for one of their customer.
 



  





**Location:** 
 Sodertalje
 



 We are seeking an experienced and delivery-focused 
 **Implementation Manager / IT Project Leader to lead D365 system** 
  implementation. 
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 



* Lead ITs deliveries into Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain (F&O) implementation projects across commercial business units.
* Plan and execute system implementation activities such as configuration, data migration, integrations, hypercare, and handover.
* Lead a squad of D365 functional and technical consultants.
* Ensure alignment between technical delivery, business requirements, and the overall project plan.
* Act as the primary IT counterpart to Business Project Managers / Implementation Managers responsible for process implementation and change management.
* Coordinate and follow up on dependencies with Blueprint teams (Solution Design, Development, Integration etc.), banks, localisation packs, and external ISVs (e.g. Comarch, Truvio Exflow, SK Global TAS).
* Document and manage any market-specific configurations and deviations from the standard Blueprint.
* Monitor progress, risks, and dependencies to ensure timely and successful project delivery.
* 



**Experience & Skills:** 



* Proven experience leading end-to-end Microsoft Dynamics 365 Finance & Supply Chain (F&O) implementations.
* Strong project management and leadership skills, with experience of working with global, cross-functional teams.
* Solid understanding of ERP implementation methodologies and lifecycle phases.
* Experience coordinating diverse stakeholders, including business, IT, and external vendors.
* Knowledge of integrations, data migration strategies, and ERP architecture.
* Experience working in complex environments with multiple dependencies.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* 



**Who You Are** 




**You are a structured and results-driven leader with a strong ability to navigate complex IT landscapes and deliver large-scale ERP implementations.** 




**You combine technical understanding with business acumen and are comfortable acting as the bridge between IT and business stakeholders. You thrive in dynamic environments and are proactive in managing risks, dependencies, and stakeholder expectations.** 



-

title: Data Engineer
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 We’re now looking for a Data Engineer to join our data engineering team in our tech department. You’ll join us on a journey of constant improvement, development and scaling of the data infrastructure powering our business insights. We’re on AWS, using services like Redshift, S3, MWAA, Kinesis, ECS, etc, and dbt + Airflow for sourcing all our e-com data from multiple sources and building insights.
   

  

**What you'll do:**
 As a Data Engineer in Haypp, you’ll find modern technologies, agile workflows, and tight integration at the heart of the business. Implement, develop, and maintain data pipelines connecting to multiple data sources such as in-house E-com platform, Google Analytics, Klaviyo, etc. You will be working with the following things on a daily basis:
   

  

* Build and maintain data pipelines and integrate to new data sources.
* Model and deliver business ready data in line with industry best practices.
* Share ownership of the integrity and quality of data.
* Liaise with stakeholders from all parts of the organisation to develop and maintain the data platform to meet business objectives.
* Grow through ownership, collaboration, and real-world data challenges.


**What We Want From You**
 We place great value on collaboration, communication, and a professional approach to teamwork, as well as relevant experience and technical competence.
   

  

 Successful candidates also meet the following requirements:
   

  

* Previous experience in Data Engineering roles.
* Fluency in SQL and Python is a must to succeed at this role.
* Experience working with dbt and Airflow.
* Experience with AWS will get you started quickly, but experience with any other cloud platform such as GCP or Azure is also considered advantageous.
* Experience building testable, scalable and maintainable code.
* You can come from any industry background, but experience within ecommerce would be a plus.
* You have a technical mindset, but also appreciate commercial thinking.
* Are a team player – needs to be able to interact with the team, be adaptable.
* A good communicator, both with technical and non-technical counterparts.
* Fluent in English. Swedish is not a requirement but is a plus.
* Curious with a will to learn and develop.


**What We Offer**
 We are a value driven company with our values
 *We team up* 
 ,
 *Innovation Drives Us* 
 ,
 *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* 
 and
 *Going the Extra Mile* 
 at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.
   

  

 Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:
   

  

* Competitive occupational pension
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!
   

  

 Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Project Manager - Development
description:
*RaySearch develops innovative software solutions to improve cancer care. About 1000 clinics in more than 40 countries use RaySearch software to improve treatments and quality of life for patients. RaySearch was founded in 2000 and is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm. The headquarters is located in Stockholm, with subsidiaries in the US, Europe and Asia - Pacific. Today we are more than 400 employees with a common vision of improving cancer care with innovative software. Our great staff is crucial for our success and we offer a fantastic working environment in modern offices, flexibility and good opportunities for development. We believe in equal opportunities, value diversity and work actively to prevent discrimination.*




 Do you have experience in technical project management and want to improve cancer care for patients around the world? Join RaySearch as a Project Manager in our development organization.
   

  





  




**About the position**

 RayCare is an innovative oncology information system designed to support clinical workflows at cancer clinics. It is developed by multiple agile teams working closely together, with expertise spanning clinical workflows, integrations, and system architecture. We develop our products in close collaboration with leading cancer clinics worldwide.
   

  





 As a Project Manager at RaySearch, you will be part of the RayCare Project Management team, working close to the core of our product development and leading technically complex initiatives within oncology software.
   

  





 This is a hands-on role where you coordinate work across development teams, Service, IT, and external partners. You will operate in an agile environment with a high degree of ownership, where your ability to create structure, drive progress, and align stakeholders is key.
   

  





 Depending on your background and interests, you may work with areas such as system integrations, vendor collaborations, or internal tools and deliveries.
 


**Responsibilities**
* Drive planning and execution of development projects and product releases
* Work closely with development teams to track progress, manage dependencies, and remove blockers
* Ensure that requirements, risks, and test activities are defined and followed through
* Secure that deliveries meet quality standards and are aligned with our development process
* Communicate status, risks, and priorities to stakeholders across the organization


**Examples of areas you may take ownership of:**

 Collaborations with treatment machine vendors including: 
 


* Drive and manage joint validation activities in clinical environments
* Support rollout, training, and knowledge transfer for machine integrations



  

  

  





 Support tools and internal deliveries including: 
 


* Drive development and delivery of internal tools used by Service and customers
* Collaborate with Professional Services on customizations and technical deliveries
* Ensure end-to-end ownership: from requirements and risk analysis to testing and handover



  




**Your profile**

 You have experience from technical project management or a similar role where you have been responsible for driving complex initiatives forward.
   

  





 You are comfortable working close to both code and infrastructure-related topics, even if you are not hands-on coding yourself. You understand how software is built, tested, and delivered – and you are able to ask the right questions to move things forward.
   

  





 You are structured, pragmatic, and used to handling multiple stakeholders, including external partners. You take ownership, communicate clearly, and are not afraid to challenge when needed.
 


**Requirements**
* BSc or MSc degree in engineering, or equivalent
* 3+ years’ experience in project management within software development
* Experience working in agile environments
* Strong communication skills in English and Swedish


**Meriting**
* Experience from the medtech industry
* Experience working with system integrations and/or external vendors
* Experience working with Azure DevOps Server
* Experience working close to Service organizations or customer deliveries



  




**Our Culture**

 Culture at RaySearch is the driving force behind our organization, where everything we do is driven guided by a shared passion for innovation and the fight against cancer. Our dedication is reflected in our ability to deliver exceptional results, pay close attention to detail, and consistently go the extra mile. Our employees stand out as experts in their field, driven by a relentless focus on solving problems - no matter how complex. At RaySearch, we take pride in leading the way in cancer treatment, leveraging cutting-edge technology to develop innovative solutions that make a real difference in patient care. 
 


**Our Offer**

 At RaySearch, we offer a diverse and inclusive work environment, fostering openness, sincerity, and collaboration. Located in Hagastaden, Stockholm's Life Science Hub, our modern and creative workspace includes an in-house gym, yoga, and social activities like ping pong, table football, and regular after-work events. Our bistro serves a fantastic lunch buffet, and we offer morning- and afternoon-fika every day. Our rooftop terrace also provides a stunning 360-degree view of Stockholm, enhancing the work experience. All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package. 
   

  





  




**Application**

 Please apply to the position through the application form below. Selection and interviews will be ongoing. We do not accept applications by email.

title: Content Specialist
description:
Datasite and its associated businesses are the global center for facilitating economic value creation for companies across the globe. From data rooms to AI deal sourcing
   

  

 and more. Here you’ll find the finest technological pioneers: Datasite, Blueflame AI, Grata, and Sherpany. They all, collectively, define the future for business growth.
   

  

 Apply for one position or as many as you like. Talent doesn’t always just go in one direction or fit in a single box. We’re happy to see whatever your superpower is and find the best place for it to flourish.
   

  

 Get started now, we look forward to meeting you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Valu8 for Datasite is looking for a high-output Content Specialist who can turn complex topics into clear, compelling content for a demanding B2B audience. This role sits at the core of Valu8’s go-to-market efforts and supports campaigns, events, webinars, sales enablement, and thought leadership.
   

  

 The role is hands-on and execution-focused. You will own content delivery end to end and collaborate closely with demand generation, sales, and product to ensure Valu8’s expertise is consistently reflected in everything we publish.
   

  

 This role is based at Valu8’s office in Stockholm.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Produce written content for Valu8’s ICP, including articles, LinkedIn posts, newsletters, emails, scripts, and case studies
* Develop content for campaigns, events, webinars, and sales enablement
* Support Valu8-hosted events by identifying and coordinating relevant speakers and panel participants, and shaping agendas and discussion themes
* Support production of webinars, interviews, and video content
* Repurpose and adapt content across channels such as email, social media, landing pages, and ads
* Collaborate closely with sales and product to extract insights, stories, and proof points
* Build and maintain a content calendar to ensure consistent, high-quality delivery
* Uphold clarity, quality, and substance across all content outputs


 Ideal Profile
   

  

* 1–4 years of experience in content marketing, journalism, communications, or a similar field
* Strong writing skills with the ability to explain complex topics clearly and precisely
* Experience creating B2B content; background in finance, SaaS, consulting, or data is a strong plus
* Comfortable contributing to webinars or video content; production or editing experience is a bonus
* Familiar with tools such as Figma and Canva
* Highly organised, reliable, and structured in execution
* Proactive, detail-oriented, and quality-driven
* Interest in finance, private markets, or data-driven products is a plus


 Our company is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce where all individuals are respected and valued. We are an equal opportunity employer and make all employment decisions without regard to race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, age, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other protected characteristic. We encourage applications from candidates of all backgrounds and are dedicated to building teams that reflect the diversity of our communities.

title: Produktägare digitala kommunikationstjänster
description:
Om tjänsten
   

  

 Vill du vara med och utveckla hur en av Sveriges viktigaste myndigheter kommunicerar i en tid av snabb förändring, där digitalisering och AI öppnar nya möjligheter att skapa värde?
   

  

 Svenska kraftnät söker en produktägare som vill ta ett samlat grepp om våra digitala kommunikationstjänster, från strategi till utveckling och förvaltning.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Kommunikationsavdelningen ansvarar för flera verksamhetskritiska digitala plattformar och tjänster, bland annat externwebb, intranät, Kommunikationshubben och olika verktyg för digital kommunikation.
   

  

 Nu stärker vi vårt arbete genom att etablera en tydlig produktägarroll med ansvar för helhet, prioritering och utveckling. Rollen har ett tydligt mandat att sätta riktning och driva utvecklingen av våra digitala kommunikationstjänster i nära samverkan med chefer, IT och verksamhet.
   

  

 Som produktägare har du en central roll i att:
   

  

* samordna helhet, riktning och prioritering för utveckling och förvaltning av avdelningens digitala kanaler.
* säkerställa att våra lösningar skapar värde för verksamhet och målgrupper
* driva utveckling i nära samverkan med IT, verksamhet och externa leverantörer


 Du bidrar till att flytta vårt arbete från fokus på enskilda system till ett sammanhållet ekosystem av kanaler, verktyg och förmågor.
   

  

**Ditt uppdrag**
 I rollen ansvarar du för att:
   

  

* samordna utveckling och förvaltning av våra digitala kommunikationskanaler och verktyg
* säkerställa en tydlig helhet och riktning i vårt digitala ekosystem
* prioritera behov och kravställa utveckling i dialog med IT och leverantörer
* ta fram beslutsunderlag och bidra i strategiska digitala vägval
* utveckla arbetssätt, processer och samverkan mellan kommunikation, verksamhet och IT
* stötta kollegor och projekt i frågor som rör digital utveckling
* ge kommunikationsledningsgruppen strategisk rådgivning i våra digitala vägval och beslut
* identifiera och driva utveckling av AI-baserade lösningar inom kommunikation, exempelvis för innehållsproduktion, analys och användarstöd
* bidra till att utveckla och kvalitetssäkra innehåll i våra digitala kanaler, inklusive att själv ta fram, förbättra och publicera innehåll
* stärka organisationens förmåga att använda våra digitala kanaler genom utbildning, stöd och vägledning


**Om dig**
**Skallkrav:**
 För att trivas i rollen tror vi att du är:
   

  

* strategisk och har ett tydligt helhetsperspektiv
* strukturerad och bra på att prioritera
* trygg i att ta ansvar och fatta avvägningar
* kommunikativ och relationsskapande
* drivande och van vid förändring


 Relevant akademisk utbildning inom kommunikation, digital utveckling, systemvetenskap eller motsvarande erfarenhet som svenska kraftnät bedömer som likvärdig.
   

  

 Du har även:
   

  

* flerårig erfarenhet av produktägarskap, digital utveckling eller liknande roll
* vana att arbeta i gränslandet mellan verksamhet och IT
* erfarenhet av att prioritera behov och omsätta dem till krav och lösningar
* god förståelse för digital kommunikation och användarbehov
* förmåga att skapa struktur och driva arbete framåt i komplexa sammanhang
* erfarenhet av förvaltning och utveckling av digitala kommunikationsplattformar i större eller komplex organisation


 Det är
 **meriterande** 
 om du har kunskap och erfarenhet av:
   

  

* offentlig verksamhet
* CMS, intranät eller andra digitala plattformar
* att identifiera, prioritera och driva utveckling av AI-baserade lösningar inom kommunikation, exempelvis för innehållsproduktion, analys och användarstöd
* arbete med licens- och verktygsportföljer inom kommunikation (t.ex. Adobe, Canva, Figma, nyhetsbrev, eventverktyg)
* agila arbetssätt
* verktyg som Optimizely, ServiceNow och Microsoft 365


**Bra att veta**
* Tjänsten är placerad i Stockholm/Sundbyberg
* Möjlighet till distansarbete upp till 50 %
* Resor kan förekomma
* Sista ansökningsdag, 2026-05-08, vi använder urvalsfrågor istället för personligt brev.
* Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning
* I denna rekryteringsprocess kan det tillämpas tester
* Förmåner | Svenska kraftnät


 Vid frågor om tjänsten kontakta gärna rekryterande chef Pernilla Klüft 010-350 9082 vid frågor om rekryteringsprocessen kontakta ansvarig rekryterare AnnSophie Doverlind 010-475 8007 , Fackliga representanter är Annika Ingeborn, SACO, 010 475 87 72 och Erica Midfjäll ST, 010 475 87 31. Du når oss också via e-post: fornamn.efternamn@svk.se
   

  

 Jobba här – bli en viktig del av vår energiframtid | Svenska kraftnät
   

  

 Vi undanber oss direktkontakt med bemannings- och rekryteringsföretag samt säljare i samband med rekrytering, vi har upphandlade avtal som gäller för Svenska kraftnät som statlig myndighet.
   

  

 Övrig information
   

  

 Vi ställer höga krav på våra medarbetares säkerhets- och sekretessmedvetenhet. Innan ett beslut om anställning fattas kommer en säkerhetsprövning enligt säkerhetsskyddslagen (2018:585) att genomföras i de fall befattningen innebär hantering av säkerhetsskyddsklassificerade uppgifter eller deltagande i säkerhetskänslig verksamhet. Om anställningen avser befattning i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövningen även att innefatta en registerkontroll och, i vissa fall, en särskild personutredning. För anställning på Svenska kraftnät kan det vara ett krav på svenskt medborgarskap i vissa befattningar. Med anställningen följer en skyldighet att krigsplaceras. För mer information om säkerhetsprövning Svenska kraftnät arbetar för att främja mångfald och motverka diskriminering och ser gärna sökanden med olika bakgrund och erfarenheter till våra rekryteringar. Lär känna Svenska kraftnät och hur det är att arbeta hos oss: Lär känna oss på Svenska kraftnät

title: Head of Engineering
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1.1 billion smokers in the world and around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives, and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering better nicotine alternatives online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands across seven markets, serving more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com and Nicokick.com we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish-style snus and other smoke-free products online.
   

  

 With our headquarters on Östgötagatan in Stockholm, we are around 300 colleagues, mainly based in Sweden but working across markets globally. We are an innovative and fast-moving company on an exciting expansion journey, helping more and more smokers switch to smoke-free alternatives.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 We’re looking for a Head of Engineering to lead our core engineering organization in Stockholm and shape the next stage of Haypp Group’s technology landscape. In this senior leadership role, you are responsible for the engineering area powering our wider technical ecosystem – including platform, services, integrations, and the architecture that enables us to scale across markets, brands, and regulatory environments.
   

  

 You lead through five direct reports (two Engineering Managers, one Product Manager, and two Product Owners) and are part of the Tech management team, reporting to the CTO alongside the Head of Data and Head of Group IT. This is a role at the intersection of technology, people, and business. You are expected to combine strategic leadership with strong technical judgment, staying close enough to architecture and system design to guide direction, challenge trade-offs, and ensure engineering excellence.
   

  

**In this role, you will:**
  
   

  

* Lead and develop the engineering organization through your direct reports
* Own and evolve the technical direction and architecture across the e-commerce ecosystem
* Ensure scalable, secure, reliable and maintainable systems across markets and platforms
* Drive technical excellence and high standards in engineering delivery and quality
* Collaborate closely with Product and business stakeholders to translate needs into technical execution
* Balance trade-offs between speed, cost, risk, stability and long-term sustainability
* Build a scalable organization with strong leadership, structure and capabilities for future growth
* Contribute as part of the Tech management team to overall technology strategy and direction


**What We Are Looking For**
  
   

  

* Proven senior leadership experience in leading and scaling engineering organizations, either through other managers or directly, regardless of specific title
* Experience driving impact in complex, business-critical digital products or platforms with high transaction volumes and strong requirements on scalability, availability, reliability, and security. Experience from transaction-heavy B2C environments is especially valued (e.g. e-commerce, marketplaces, fintech, or similar)
* A solid technical foundation, with the ability to engage credibly in high-level architectural discussions, system design decisions, and technology trade-offs
* A strong understanding of how technical decisions influence business outcomes, customer experience, and organizational effectiveness
* A clear, authentic leadership approach with the ability to build trust, alignment, and strong collaboration across teams and functions
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to translate complex technical topics into clear and relevant insights for non-technical stakeholders


**YOU WILL PROBABLY THRIVE HERE IF YOU**
  
   

  

* Are motivated by building scalable systems, teams and organizations in a regulated environment
* Like working at the intersection of technology, product and business strategy
* Thrive in environments where long-term architecture and short-term execution must coexist
* Value clarity, trust and empowered teams over micromanagement


**What We Offer**
 We are a value-driven company with our values We Team Up, Innovation Drives Us, Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy, and Going the Extra Mile at the heart of everything we do.
   

  

 At Haypp Group you can always expect supportive colleagues who want to achieve things together and a culture where everyone’s voice matters. We encourage ideas from all parts of the organization and are not afraid to try new things. At the same time, we celebrate achievements and recognize the hard work that goes into reaching them.
   

  

 Because our people are our most important differentiator, we offer generous benefits including:
   

  

  
   

  

* Competitive occupational pension
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Regular social activities and team events


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, we would love to hear from you. Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity and welcomes applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or marital status.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or about working at Haypp Group, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Anna Persson at anna.persson@hayppgroup.com.
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Production Engineer
description:
**Crane Currency söker en Produktionsingenjör till sin anläggning i Tumba!** 




  





**Vilka vi är:** 




 Crane Currency är ett globalt företag som är ledande inom sedeltillverkning och säkerhetsteknik. Chansen är stor att du redan har vår produkt i din plånbok!
 



 Vi arbetar med modern utrustning och egenutvecklade program för att använda våra viktigaste tekniker inom detektering och identifiering. Våra kunder världen över litar på oss för att leverera innovativa, pålitliga och högkvalitativa lösningar – precis som vi har gjort i generationer. Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta med spännande teknik i en internationell miljö och bidra till att skapa säkra produkter som används varje dag. Läs mer om oss på: www.cranecurrency.com
 



  





**Så här kan du påverka:** 




 Som Produktionsingenjör på Crane Currency säkerställer du rätt kvalitet, körbarhet och hög tillgänglighet inom Pappersbruket. Du följer upp processer, analyserar data och utreder avvikelser i produktivitet och kvalitet för att identifiera rotorsaker och driva förbättrande åtgärder. Rollen innebär även att du utbildar personal, utvecklar rutiner och leder initiativ som höjer den övergripande effektiviteten. Genom ditt arbete bidrar du till en stabil drift, optimerade produktionsprocesser och en fortsatt hög standard på våra produkter.
 



  





**I din roll kommer du att:** 



* **Följa upp processer,** 
 analysera data samt utreda avvikelser och deras rotorsaker inom produktivitet och kvalitet för att optimera resultaten och säkerställa konsekventa kvalitetsstandarder.
* **Utbilda operatörer** 
 för att säkerställa rätt kompetens inom kvalitetskontroll och användning av teknisk utrustning, och därigenom bidra till en kunnig och skicklig arbetsstyrka.
* **Samarbeta med underhållsteamet (UH)** 
 för att ta fram checklistor och rutiner för underhåll och uppföljning, vilket bidrar till en stabil och effektiv drift.
* **Vara kundorienterad** 
 och upprätthålla kontakt med kunder vid behov, samt ge stöd och vägledning vid Pappersbruket i samband med tekniska frågor eller problem.
* **Delta i arbete med produktionsförberedelser** 
 och säkerställa att alla nödvändiga steg genomförs för att nå produktionsmålen och upprätthålla höga kvalitetskrav.
* **Utveckla och säkerställa kvalitetsrutiner** 
 för avdelningens tekniska utrustning så att samtliga processer uppfyller branschstandarder och regulatoriska krav.



  










**Kunskap, expertis och kvalifikationer:** 




**Krav:** 



* **Utbildning: Civilingenjörsexamen eller motsvarande erfarenhet.**
* 5–7 års erfarenhet som produktionsingenjör inom pappers- eller processindustrin.
* Erfarenhet av lean-arbetssätt.
* Goda datorkunskaper.
* **God förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska** 
 .
* **IT:** 
 Goda kunskaper i Office‑paketet



  





**Meriterande:** 




**Erfarenhet av LEAN / Six Sigma.** 




  





**Tumba - Förmåner** 




**Så här tar vi hand om dig:** 




 Vi erbjuder konkurrenskraftiga förmåner, inklusive friskvårdsbidrag och ersättning för mediciner och medicinsk vård, möjligheter till personlig utveckling, samhällsengagemang, konkurrenskraftig ersättning, semester, föräldraledighet och pensionsplaner. Läs mer om våra förmåner här https://www.cranecurrency.com/careers/benefits/
 



  





**Det som driver vårt team:** 




 Vi är ett engagerat team med 1 200 kreativa och lösningsorienterade medarbetare, förenade av vårt gemensamma syfte: att ge människor trygghet i de ögonblick som betyder mest. Detta genomsyrar allt vi gör och kommer till uttryck genom våra gemensamma värderingar.
 


* People Matter
* Innovate for Growth
* Do the Right Thing
* Always Improving
* Trusted Partner







 Läs mer om våra värderingar och vår kultur: https://www.cranecurrency.com/careers/life-at-crane-currency/
 



  





 Läs mer om oss: https://www.glassdoor.com/Reviews/Crane-Currency-Reviews-E1187198.htm
 



 Anställningen är i Tumba, Stockholm. Beläget i det anrika området Tumba Bruk, 10 minuters promenad från tågstationen, 30 km söder om Stockholm, och cirka 20 minuter från Stockholms Centralstation.
 



 Läs mer om vad som gör Tumba till en fantastisk plats att bo och arbeta på här: https://www.cranecurrency.com/media/12rbruyv/0133-ex55-crane-currency-tumba-sweden-site-location-package-october-2024-lr.pdf
 



 -----
 



 Crane NXT är en arbetsgivare som erbjuder lika möjligheter. Kvalificerade sökande kommer att beaktas för anställning utan hänsyn till etnicitet, hudfärg, religion, kön, ålder, funktionsnedsättning, eller någon annan egenskap som skyddas enligt tillämplig lokal lagstiftning.
 



 #LI-CCY
 



**#ONSITE** 




**#LI-KP1**

title: Junior Upphandlare
description:
**Bygg framtidens Solna tillsammans med oss!**
*Är du redo att vara en del av en spännande resa? På Signalisten är vi i en expansiv fas och arbetar med hög takt inom både nyproduktion och renoveringar av våra fastigheter. Vi är stolta över vårt uppdrag att skapa fler trygga och trivsamma hem i Solna och bidra till stadens utveckling.*
*Hos oss får du en möjlighet att göra skillnad och ta ansvar för samhällsutvecklingen! Vill du vara med och bidra till en levande och hållbar stad? Välkommen till oss!*
**Junior Upphandlare**
**Vill du vara med och effektivisera vårt upphandlingsarbete i en engagerad organisation med ett stort och viktigt samhällsuppdrag? Hos Signalisten får du chansen att påverka hur vi utvecklar och förvaltar hållbara, trygga och långsiktiga bostäder – samtidigt som du får arbeta nära verksamheten och verkligen se resultatet av ditt arbete.**
 Vi söker dig som troligtvis är i början av din karriär och/eller dig som vill skaffa dig värdefulla erfarenheter samt kunskaper inom upphandlingar, dess olika processer och arbetssätt.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en tjänst i ett team med lång erfarenhet samt med hög kompetens. Detta är en fantastisk möjlighet att få arbeta i en spännande bransch samtidigt som det finns utvecklingsmöjligheter. Har du erfarenhet av liknande roller och – eller har en YH-utbildning samt är strukturerad, skarpt öga för detaljer, driven och snabb lärd – kan du vara precis den vi letar efter.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som upphandlare hos oss kommer du tillhöra Upphandlingsenheten som är ett litet och sammansvetsat team bestående av Upphandlare, Avtalscontroller och Upphandlingschef. Vi arbetar nära varandra, delar kunskap och har korta beslutsvägar. Vi värderar gemenskap och trivsel i gruppen, det ska vara roligt att komma till jobbet!
   

  

 Upphandlingsenheten och denna roll ingår även i vår Utvecklingsavdelning där övriga roller såsom Kommunikation, IT, Verksamhetsutveckling, Hållbarhet, Miljö, Arkiv, Kvalitét, Trygghet och Säkerhet också ingår.
   

  

 Signalisten har under en tid arbetat för att stärka och utveckla vårt strategiska inköpsarbete, bland annat genom att höja kunskapen om strategiskt inköp, genomföra riktade utbildningsinsatser och ta fram tydliga rutiner, processer och mallar som skapar ett mer effektivt och enhetligt arbetssätt.
   

  

 Nu vill vi bygga vidare och skapa utvecklingsmöjligheter tillsammans med dig.
   

  

 Som junior upphandlare på Signalisten, blir du en viktig teammedlem som hjälper oss med struktur och effektiviseringar. Du kommer få inblick i våra olika verksamheter och våra upphandlingsprojekt. Det finns möjligheter att skaffa sig värdefulla erfarenheter samt kunskaper inom upphandlingsområdet samtidigt som det är viktigt att vara prestigélös och kunna hantera olika arbetsuppgifter med olika svårighetsgrader samt karaktärer. Arbetsuppgifterna består främst av att arbeta med administrativa arbetsuppgifter inom upphandlingsområdet. I det ingår bland annat att ansvara för upphandlingsenhetens funktionsbrevlåda, hjälpa och stötta organisationen med direktupphandlingar, avrop och förnyade konkurrensutsättningar. Det finns möjligheter att på sikt få arbeta med större upphandlingar och vara med och bidra till viktiga resultat. En viktig del av ditt arbete är att säkerställa att våra inköp sker på ett affärsmässigt och hållbart sätt, samtidigt som vi följer lagstiftning och regelverk, såsom LOU.
   

  

**Ditt uppdrag handlar också om att:**
* Samarbeta och skapa effektiviseringar alltifrån effektiviseringar i processer till samarbetet i upphandlingsteamet likväl som samarbeten mellan andra interna enheter
* Utveckla och finslipa arbetssätt och processer så att de stödjer både kvalitet, hållbarhet och effektivitet.
* Bidra med ett proaktivt samt strukturerat arbetssätt i allt från tidig struktur av dokument, administrativt bistå teamet med diverse administration, ta fram underlag till effektiviseringar samt få delta i vissa upphandlingar.
* Säkra att våra rutiner fortsätter att vara levande och användbara, och arbeta proaktivt med kvalitetsarbetet.


**Vem är du?**
 För att trivas i rollen behöver du vara målmedveten och på ett bra sätt kunna planera och organisera ditt arbete. Du slutför det som påbörjats och håller deadlines, du är noggrann och analytisk.
   

  

 Vidare trivs du att arbeta i en roll där du samarbetar med andra och fokuserar mot ett gemensamt mål men inte har några problem med att arbeta självständigt. Vi ser gärna att du är drivande och initiativrik. Vi tror att du är lösningsorienterad och bidrar med nya idéer kring effektiviseringar, struktur och dokumentation. Du har en pedagogisk förmåga i både tal och skrift som gör att du med enkelhet skapar goda relationer och nätverk. Du har en stark förmåga att snabbt sätta dig in i ny information och arbetssätt, samtidigt som du gärna skaffar dig nya erfarenheter genom att lära dig av andra.
   

  

 Vår organisation präglas av stor vilja till erfarenhetsutbyte och samverkan. Vi värdesätter därför att du är prestigelös och delar med dig av dina erfarenheter och din kunskap. Du har även goda kunskaper i Office-paketet (främst Office 365) samt erfarenhet av och är trygg med att arbeta i digitala system. Du har mycket goda kunskaper i det svenska språket och har lätt för att uttrycka dig i tal och skrift.
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid personlig lämplighet.
   

  

**Vi söker dig som:**
* Relevant YH-utbildning eller relevant akademisk utbildning, exempelvis, juridik, ekonomi, inköp eller likvärdigt
* God kännedom om Lagen om offentlig upphandling, LOU
* Goda kunskaper i Office-paketet
* Mycket god förmåga att uttrycka sig i tal och skrift på svenska


**Det är meriterande om du har:**
* Erfarenhet ifrån offentlig verksamhet, bygg,- anläggning- eller fastighetsbranschen
* Erfarenhet av kontorsarbete där det ställts krav på initiativförmåga, noggrannhet samt att arbeta med uppsatta deadlines.


**Vårt erbjudande till dig**
 Hos oss får du möjlighet att vara en del av en verksamhet i expansiv fas. Vi erbjuder en arbetsmiljö där du får utveckla både dig själv och dina erfarenheter.
   

  

 Läs mer om oss och vad vi kan erbjuda dig www.signalisten.se
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan!**
**Arbetstider**
 måndag–torsdag 08.00-17.00, fredag 08.00-15.00.
   

  

 Enligt nuvarande rutin är det möjligt med distansarbete upp till 2 dagar/vecka om arbetet tillåter.
   

  

**Tillsättning**
 Tillsättning sker snarast, enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Ansökan**
 Ansök
 **senast 2026-05-18** 
 . Vi har inte möjlighet att ta emot ansökningar på något annat sätt än via vår annons. Intervjuer sker löpande och tjänsten kan komma att tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum. Vi rekommenderar dig därför att skicka in ditt intresse snarast möjligt.
   

  

 Vi tillämpar bakgrundskontroll på slutkandidat som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess.
   

  

**Frågor om tjänsten**
 Om du har frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta Helen Eng, Upphandlingschef, på helen.eng@signalisten.se
   

  

**Frågor om rekryteringsprocessen**
 Om du har frågor om rekryteringsprocessen är du välkommen att kontakta Frida Arlegård, HR på frida.arlegard@signalisten.se

title: Software Engineer - Sana
description:
**Your work days are brighter here.**
 We’re obsessed with making hard work pay off, for our people, our customers, and the world around us. As a Fortune 500 company and a leading AI platform for managing people, money, and agents, we’re shaping the future of work so teams can reach their potential and focus on what matters most. The minute you join, you’ll feel it. Not just in the products we build, but in how we show up for each other. Our culture is rooted in integrity, empathy, and shared enthusiasm. We’re in this together, tackling big challenges with bold ideas and genuine care. We look for curious minds and courageous collaborators who bring sun-drenched optimism and drive. Whether you're building smarter solutions, supporting customers, or creating a space where everyone belongs, you’ll do meaningful work with Workmates who’ve got your back. In return, we’ll give you the trust to take risks, the tools to grow, the skills to develop and the support of a company invested in you for the long haul.
