Born in Lisbon, Portugal in 2018—and now with offices in both Lisbon and San Francisco—we’ve remained self-funded while reaching over 100 million downloads worldwide.
   

  

 Our long-term focus drives us to challenge the status quo every day, pushing the boundaries of AI-driven solutions that truly make a difference. Here, you’ll be a creative force, shaping products that empower people across the globe.
   

  

 Join us on this journey to redefine resource management—and change lives along the way.
   

  

**The Role**
 As a
 **Creative Producer (Video Producer)** 
 at Air Apps, you will lead the end-to-end production of video content that strengthens our brand storytelling, educates users, and drives engagement across various digital platforms. This role combines creative vision with project management expertise to ensure high-quality video production while adhering to timelines and budgets.
   

  

 Please note that this post serves the purpose of enhancing our talent pool while we prepare to launch the official job. As soon as it gets posted we will get in touch with you.
   

  

* This is a fully onsite position, based at our office in Lisbon, where you will collaborate closely with cross-functional teams in person and contribute to a dynamic and fast-paced environment. We are open to support with relocation efforts.


**Responsibilities**
* Concept & Scripting: Collaborate with Marketing, Creative, and Product teams to develop compelling video concepts, write scripts, and create storyboards that align with brand guidelines and objectives.
* Production Management: Oversee all aspects of video production, including hiring and directing crews, sourcing talent, managing sets and locations, and ensuring necessary equipment is available.
* Post-Production Oversight: Guide the editing process, including color grading, sound design, and motion graphics, to deliver polished and engaging video content.
* Platform Optimization: Ensure video assets are optimized for various platforms such as social media, web, and in-app content while maintaining consistent production quality.
* Quality Control & Budgeting: Maintain brand standards, adhere to deadlines, and ensure video production stays within budget constraints.


**Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in Film, Media Production, Communications, or a related field.
* Approximately 3+ years of experience in video production, including conceptualization, filming, and editing.
* Proficiency with video editing software (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro) and knowledge of production equipment.
* Strong project management, organizational, and communication skills.
* Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously while maintaining attention to detail.


**What benefits are we offering?**
* Apple hardware ecosystem for work.
* Flexible Paid Time Off (PTO) to support work-life balance.
* Annual Bonus.
* Top-tier Health Insurance for peace of mind.
* Public Transportation Pass to support your commute needs.
* Coverflex benefits package for meal allowances, well-being, and more.
* Air Conference 2025 in Las Vegas – an opportunity to meet the team, collaborate, and grow together.


**Diversity & Inclusion**
 At Air Apps, we are committed to fostering a diverse, inclusive, and equitable workplace. We enthusiastically welcome applicants from all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives. We celebrate diversity in all its forms and believe that varied voices and experiences make us stronger.
   

  

**Application Disclaimer**
 At Air Apps, we value transparency and integrity in our hiring process. Applicants must submit their own work without any AI-generated assistance. Any use of AI in application materials, assessments, or interviews will result in disqualification.

title: Project Manager, Cards & Payments, bridging technology and business
description:
**About Us**
 Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  

 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.
   

  

 Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.
   

  

**Job Description**
 What’s it all about?
   

  

 Visa Consulting and Analytics (VCA) is the consulting arm of Visa and drives tangible, impactful, and measurable financial results for Visa’s network clients, including financial institutions, FinTechs, and merchants. Drawing on expertise in strategy, data analytics, payments, operations, and economics, VCA helps clients solve their most important business challenges and capture new growth opportunities.
   

  

 VCA Implementation Services (VIS) extends Visa’s consulting capabilities by turning strategic recommendations into practical, scalable solutions. We help clients implement change effectively, accelerate adoption, and realize value faster in an increasingly digital payments landscape.
   

  

 We are looking for a Project Manager for Cards and Payments with a strong blend of fluency in both business and technology. This role is ideal for someone who can confidently engage with senior business stakeholders, technology teams, and compliance functions alike, and translate complex technical conversations into clear business opportunities and measurable financial outcomes.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is comfortable assessing current-state technology environments, shaping future-state blueprints, and contributing to technical design across modern payments solutions. At the same time, they can connect these technical capabilities to broader client priorities, whether that means enabling growth, improving efficiency, reducing risk, or accelerating time to market. This role requires someone who can bridge technology, business, and compliance, and turn technical change into strategic and commercial value.
   

  

 You will lead the end-to-end delivery of Visa product integrations, implementation, and migration projects, including solutions such as Pismo, Tink, and Visa Direct, while also acting as a trusted advisor to clients. Beyond driving readiness, execution, and successful adoption, you will help identify where technology can unlock new business opportunities, strengthen client propositions, and deliver meaningful commercial outcomes for both clients and Visa.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Lead end-to-end implementation, integration, and migration initiatives across Visa’s cards and payments solutions
* Assess client technology landscapes and help shape practical target-state designs, blueprints, and delivery approaches
* Bridge technology, business, and compliance stakeholders to ensure alignment and successful execution
* Translate complex technical topics into clear business value, client impact, and commercial opportunities
* Manage project scope, timelines, risks, dependencies, and governance across cross-functional teams
* Act as a trusted advisor to clients throughout delivery, helping drive adoption, readiness, and measurable outcomes
* Identify opportunities to strengthen client value, accelerate impact, and support broader business growth
* Use data, metrics, and client feedback to track progress and improve delivery performance


 Why this role?
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of technology delivery, business value, and client impact. It is a strong fit for someone who enjoys understanding how things work technically but is equally motivated by the commercial and strategic outcomes those solutions can create.
   

  

 You will not only help clients implement Visa solutions successfully but also help them understand how technology can enable growth, unlock efficiency, strengthen compliance readiness, and create measurable financial value. In doing so, you will play an important role in connecting delivery excellence with broader client success.
   

  

*This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.*
**Qualifications**
 What we’re after:
   

  

* Experience leading implementation, delivery, or migration projects in payments, cards, FinTech, or financial services
* Strong understanding of the cards and payments ecosystem and related client and market dynamics
* Technical fluency across APIs, integrations, data architecture, and real-time processing environments
* Ability to assess current-state environments and contribute to future-state designs and technical solution discussions
* Strong commercial mindset, with the ability to connect technical delivery to business value and financial impact
* Confidence working across technology, business, and compliance functions, including senior stakeholders
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and problem-solving skills
* Experience working in Agile, SAFe, and/or Waterfall delivery environments
* Analytical, adaptable, and comfortable operating in complex client settings


**Visa is an EEO Employer**
 Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
*Mycronic is a global high-tech company that has been driving the electronics industry forward for over 50 years. We continue to grow and support customers across an increasing number of industries, and what we do shapes the technologies that define the society of the future – how we live our lives today and tomorrow.* 




  





*We are now looking for more people who want to join and strengthen our dedicated and driven teams at the forefront of technology. With us, you will work in an open, flexible, and collaborative environment where you collaborate closely with leading experts and take on challenging projects that turn ideas into reality and bring tomorrow’s electronics to life.* 




  





**About the position** 




  





 In this role you will be a key partner at the heart of the business, with close exposure to strategic topics and daily collaboration with the executive management team, divisional leadership and global functions. You will step into an international, technology-driven environment where professionalism is combined with a down-to-earth culture, and where your ability to create structure, drive progress and support top management will be highly valued.
 



  





 You will play a central role in the executives daily work, combining classic executive assistant responsibilities with broader coordination across the executive team and global organization. The position includes calendar and inbox management, proactive meeting and travel planning, handling of legal documents as well as a acting gatekeeper who helps leaders focus on the right priorities at the right time and conducting ad-hoc tasks. A key part of the role is coordinating and preparing material for board meetings, ensuring that documentation, presentations and logistics are in place and of quality. You will work closely with the Executive management team, the Legal team and other group functions, as well as the divisional leadership teams who are based in Sweden, Germany, US and China.
 



  





 In addition, the role includes a broad scope of ad-hoc tasks primarily supporting the CEO and CFO, which may arise on short notice and require flexibility and a proactive mindset.
 



  





 You will be based at Mycronic’s headquarters in Täby, where you will be an important part of a driven team working towards shared goals. If you enjoy a varied and fast-paced workday, with a high level of insight into the business, you could be the person we are looking for.
 



  





**Who are we looking for?** 




  





 To be successful in this role you are an experienced Executive Assistant having worked in similar roles supporting senior managers and C-level leaders, preferably in other big-listed international companies. You are fluent in both Swedish and English and are used to working in English, both as the working language and with documents and materials. Of course, you need to have professional skills in Microsoft Office, Zoom and Teams.
 



  





 For this position, personal characteristics are of the highest importance. We expect you to carry out your work proactively and take great responsibility and pride in your job. At the same time, you understand the value of being in a team working together to achieve the best results and providing the best support. You put high value on being professional, accurate and know what it requires of you to handle both sensitive and confidential information. Further you are highly experienced in providing administrative support to Executive Managers. You are service minded throughout; there is nothing you enjoy more than bringing top-class service to those you work with. Effective communication and networking skills will also be important qualities for you to thrive in this role.
 



  





**We review applications regularly, so don’t wait, Apply here!** 




  





 For questions, please contact Louise Eriksson Hellstrand at Novare Interim & Recruitment,
 
 louise.eriksson-hellstrand@novare.se
 
 , who is supporting Mycronic in this recruitment. Please note that we do not accept applications by e-mail due to data protection regulations (GDPR). A background check will be conducted on the final candidate.
 



  





 To learn more about Mycronic, please watch our company video: Mycronic - Bringing tomorrow´s electronics to life.
 



  





**We look forward to reading your application!**

title: Engagement Manager
description:
Your future duties and responsibilities
   

  

**Required Qualifications To Be Successful In This Role**
**Together, as owners, let’s turn meaningful insights into action.**
 Life at CGI is rooted in ownership, teamwork, respect and belonging. Here, you’ll reach your full potential because…
   

  

 You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. That’s why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our company’s strategy and direction.
   

  

 Your work creates value. You’ll develop innovative solutions and build relationships with teammates and clients while accessing global capabilities to scale your ideas, embrace new opportunities, and benefit from expansive industry and technology expertise.
   

  

 You’ll shape your career by joining a company built to grow and last. You’ll be supported by leaders who care about your health and well-being and provide you with opportunities to deepen your skills and broaden your horizons.
   

  

 Come join our team—one of the largest IT and business consulting services firms in the world.

title: AI Architect
description:
Choosing Capgemini means choosing a company where you will be empowered to shape your career in the way you’d like, where you’ll be supported and inspired by a collaborative community of colleagues around the world, and where you’ll be able to reimagine what’s possible. Join us and help the world’s leading organizations unlock the value of technology and build a more sustainable, more inclusive world.
 



  





**Your role** 




 As an AI Architect with Capgemini, you will lead the design and implementation of scalable, secure, and production ready AI solutions within modern cloud architectures. You will translate business needs into technical architectures, guide engineering teams, and ensure that AI systems are robust, compliant, and ready for industrial deployment.
 



  





*In this role you will play a key role in:* 



* Designing end to end AI architectures leveraging Azure, Databricks, Azure ML, and OpenAI services.
* Driving solution design decisions, technology selection, and architectural patterns for enterprise grade AI deployments.
* Collaborating closely with Data Scientists, Data Engineers, Software Engineers, and DevOps to ensure seamless integration and operationalization of AI solutions.
* Defining data strategies for AI, covering ingestion, storage, transformation, governance, and quality to ensure reliable model performance.



  





**Your profile** 



* Proven industry experience delivering AI or data-driven solutions beyond training or academic prototypes.
* Hands-on experience architecting and deploying AI/ML systems in Azure (e.g., Azure ML, OpenAI, Databricks).
* Strong understanding of modern cloud-native architectures (API design, microservices, CI/CD, MLOps, security & compliance).
* Experience guiding cross-functional teams and communicating technical decisions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.
* Nice to have: Automotive industry familiarity but not required.



  





**What we believe you will enjoy about working here** 



* The opportunity to shape next generation AI solutions with real impact in a highly innovative automotive environment.
* A collaborative culture with experts across AI, data, architecture, engineering, and design.
* Access to cutting edge technologies, continuous learning opportunities, and a global community of AI practitioners.



  





**Application** 




*As part of our recruitment process, identity verification will be conducted through inspection of your ID card, and background checks may be carried out as required.* 




  





**About Capgemini** 




 Capgemini is an AI-powered global business and technology transformation partner, delivering tangible business value. We imagine the future of organizations and make it real with AI, technology and people. With our strong heritage of nearly 60 years, we are a responsible and diverse group of 420,000 team members in more than 50 countries. We deliver end-to-end services and solutions with our deep industry expertise and strong partner ecosystem, leveraging our capabilities across strategy, technology, design, engineering and business operations. The Group reported 2024 global revenues of €22.1 billion.
 



  





 Make it real | www.capgemini.com

title: Sales Support Sweden
description:
**Location** 
 : This is a hybrid role, offering a combination of being able to work remotely and from our Kista office.
   

  

**Contract Type** 
 : full-time
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 This Sales Support role offers a unique opportunity to play a critical behind‑the‑scenes role in driving commercial success. Focused on Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) accounts, you will provide essential support to both field and internal sales teams, ensuring the sales process is efficient, accurate, and commercially sound.
   

  

 While this position is not customer‑facing, its impact is significant. Your attention to detail in preparing and reviewing quotations will help secure profitable deals while balancing customer satisfaction. By analysing historical agreements, you will actively protect margins and contribute to the long‑term financial health of the business. Through insightful reporting and analysis, you will support data‑driven decision‑making that strengthens sales performance and strategic planning.
   

  

 As a trusted partner to the sales community, your work will enable confident negotiations, smoother execution, and stronger customer relationships – ultimately supporting sustainable business growth.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Prepare accurate and commercially sound quotations by gathering requirements, analysing pricing, and coordinating internal approvals.
* Support sales teams throughout the quotation and agreement process, enabling confident negotiations and timely deal progression.
* Review and audit historical agreements to identify margin risks and develop recommendations to protect and improve profitability.
* Ensure consistency and compliance of agreement practices and commercial policies across branches and internal sales teams.
* Produce insightful reporting on agreements, sales performance, pipeline health, and key KPIs to support decision‑making.
* Analyse sales and agreement data to identify trends, support forecasting, and drive continuous improvement.
* Maintain sales systems and tools to ensure accurate data, effective reporting, and reliable commercial insights.


**What You’ll Bring**
* Proven experience in a sales support, sales operations, or similar commercial role.
* Fluency in Swedish and English, with the ability to communicate clearly and professionally in a business environment.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret data, identify trends, and support data‑driven decisions.
* High attention to detail, ensuring accuracy and consistency in quotations, agreements, and reporting.
* A structured, solution‑oriented mindset, with the ability to resolve issues within the sales and commercial process.
* A customer‑focused approach, balancing commercial objectives with customer needs.
* Proficiency in CRM systems (preferably Salesforce) and Microsoft Office tools for analysis and reporting.
* Ability to work collaboratively with cross‑functional teams across sales, finance, and other functions.


**We Are RS**
 We’ve been solving industry problems for over 80 years. We turn the ‘what ifs’ into the ‘why nots’, the impossible into the possible.
   

  

 Our purpose? Making amazing happen for a better world.
   

  

 We offer service and product solutions to over 1.2 million customers globally, shipping a parcel every 2 seconds to over 130 countries. With over 800,000 stocked and 3 million unstocked products, we’re a trusted partner to the world’s leading industries.
   

  

 We’re looking for curious, driven, and empathetic professionals to join our journey. People who think differently, act with purpose, and want to make a real impact.
   

  

**Rewards**
 Our Reward Strategy Philosophy is designed to offer market competitive base salaries and provide all of our people the opportunity to participate in a short-term incentive, enabling them to share in the success of the Company.
   

  

 Our total reward package is more than just the cash; our recognition and benefit offering provide the opportunity for us to recognise, reward and enable the wellbeing of our people at all stages of their journey with RS. Our rewards and benefits in Sweden include:
   

  

* Financial – pension scheme, bonus
* Wellbeing – insurances
* Lifestyle – sport benefit
* Spotlight – our global recognition programme provides a platform to highlight and recognise people role modelling our values


**Ready to Make Amazing Happen?**
 Join c. 9,000 colleagues and help us shape the future of our industry. Whoever you are, wherever you are – it all starts here.
   

  

 Apply now and make RS a part of your journey.

title: Analytics Lead
description:
**Craft:**
 Data, Analytics & Strategy
   

  

**Job Description:**
 As the Analytics Lead for Foundation in Candy Crush Saga, your responsibility is to lead the Analytics work across the domain. You and the team are responsible for feeding valuable insights that will guide the product discovery, product priorities and support along the development process, including AI/ML initiatives. Your responsibility is also to understand and inform on the domain's performance and outlook while delivering timely, accurate, and relevant reporting. As an expert in your area, you will provide actionable information and tools to the right stakeholders at the right time, enabling the domain to make informed decisions.
   

  

 You will also establish and maintain robust methodologies and processes to support a solid experimentation strategy and help set standards for excellent operations. By continuously identifying opportunities for improvement, you will empower the organization to deliver better experiences to our players.
   

  

 Reporting into the Product Director your primary focus will be to build and lead the team of Data scientist and product analysts and drive the insights generation and process for the domain, and the wider Candy team when it comes to operations and insights.
   

  

 In short, the purpose of the role is to:
   

  

* Source for insight on past, current and future performance of the domain products as a whole. This includes Candy work on AI/ML as well.
* Deliver actionable insights that enable Foundation domain to execute its strategy effectively and support its journey toward growth
* Report on domain’s performance internally and to the broader Candy organization including reporting of value creation from product teams (incl. e.g. P&O reporting)
* Oversee and improve Foundation experimentation methodology and processes
* Perform targeted domain specific analysis
* Set direction and drive the work Analytics, Data Science and Operations in Foundation
* Reports and analytics tools building (and automation)
* Incident mgmt support and KPI trends monitoring
* Interface and collaboration with finance on budgeting, forecasting, and analyzing in-game revenue and player engagement metrics, including spending patterns, monetization performance, and key indicators
* Build a high performing and engaged team


 Besides your analytics and operations responsibility, you will be mentoring and coaching the broader Foundation domain on best practices on analytics and insights generation.
   

  

 Skills to Create Thrills
   

  

 You have the vision and ability to see the bigger picture, and translate it into innovative initiatives and tangible goals. You can influence and drive new ways of working. As a manager, you know how to develop, lead and inspire a highly-skilled team.
   

  

 Other skills include:
   

  

* Able to fully own an experimentation, business insights and reporting team and make decisions
* Strong analytics and business performance knowledge
* Ability to take ownership of both business impact and team engagement
* Understanding of analytics, production, operations and incident processes and ability to drive delivery. Understanding of how to work with AI/ML in games is a plus.
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Able to establish impactful processes and ways of working for a highly functional org
* Able to create a positive, evolving team culture and environment to support engagement, ownership, and accountability
* 5+ years professional experience in analytics with exposure and understanding of reporting and systems, including business
* Passion for empirical research and qualitative research
* Advanced spreadsheet skills and proficiency with statistical packages
* Collaborative team player with exceptional analytical and interpersonal skills
* Experienced people/team leader, with experience in leading analytical roles such as Data Scientists and Product Analysts as well as experience leading operations
* High-impact communication skills with ability to present complex data in logical, concise and insightful ways
* Results orientation with strong track record of success and real impact
* Evidence of learning quickly and ability to build on existing business foundations
* Integrity, advanced professionalism and ability to maintain strict confidentiality of company and employee information
* BA or BS required, MS ( or PHD ) preferred
* Prior experience in the gaming industry


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Senior Backend Developer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Senior Backend Developer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 You’ll join a platform team at the center of a transformation of our commercial backend. We build and maintain a standardized, flexible, and resilient commerce foundation that reduces technical complexity, helping our product teams move faster and be more creative.
   

  

**In Practice, That Means**
* Simplifying a complex legacy landscape
* Building modern services alongside it
* Creating clear APIs, patterns, and capabilities that other teams can rely on
* Making it easier, not harder, for teams to build and experiment


**What You'll Do**
* Take ownership from problem → solution → production → iteration
* Make pragmatic technical decisions that balance speed, quality, and business impact
* Collaborate closely with multiple teams - this is a highly cross-team role
* Contribute to evolving our platform from legacy to modern, modular solutions
* Leverage AI tools where it adds value, from accelerating development to improving quality and learning faster


**What We’re Looking For**
 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* Strong backend experience (Node.js, Rust, or similar)
* Experience working with cloud platforms (preferably AWS)
* Experience contributing to refactoring or modernization efforts
* Experience working across team boundaries


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Experience from a platform or enablement team
* Experience in high-traffic/transactional systems
* Experience working in ambiguous or fast-changing environments


**You’ll Thrive Here If You**
* Have a bias for action - you don’t wait for perfect clarity before starting to deliver
* Are pragmatic - you know when something is “good enough” and iterate from there
* Are comfortable working with complex or legacy systems
* Take ownership and drive your work forward independently
* Enjoy collaborating and enabling other teams to succeed
* Are comfortable in a fluid, evolving environment
* Are curious about new tools and ways of working


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: QC Immunolog
description:
**QC Immunolog – konsultuppdrag hos AstraZeneca** 




**📍 Plats:** 
 Södertälje
 



**🕒 Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
 



**📄 Anställningsform:** 
 Konsultuppdrag via agap2
 



**📅 Start:** 
 Enligt överenskommelse
 



  





 Vill du arbeta i en miljö där ditt arbete faktiskt bidrar till livsviktig medicin? Nu söker vi en QC Immunolog till ett spännande konsultuppdrag hos AstraZeneca i Södertälje.
 



 Det här är en perfekt möjlighet för dig som är nyexaminerad eller i början av din karriär – och vill utvecklas inom kvalitetskontroll och bioanalys i en högteknologisk och samhällsviktig verksamhet.
 



  





**Om uppdraget** 




 Du blir en del av Sweden Biomanufacturing Center (SBC), en central hub för produktion och kvalitetssäkring av biologiska läkemedel. Här arbetar du i ett engagerat team inom QC Bioassay & Sample Management, där fokus ligger på att säkerställa produktkvalitet och patientsäkerhet.
 



 Du kommer arbeta i en dynamisk och internationell miljö där samarbete, innovation och kontinuerliga förbättringar står i centrum.
 



  





**Dina arbetsuppgifter** 



* Utföra cellbaserade potency-analyser
* Arbeta med cellodling och bioanalytiska metoder såsom ELISA
* Delta i tekniköverföringar och implementering av nya metoder
* Arbeta enligt gällande cGxP-riktlinjer (GMP/GLP)
* Bidra till förbättringsarbete enligt LEAN-principer
* Dokumentation och kvalitetssäkring av analysresultat



  





**Kravprofil** 



* Naturvetenskaplig högskoleexamen inom exempelvis bioteknik, biokemi, cellbiologi, biomedicin eller liknande
* *Alternativt motsvarande erfarenhet inom bioanalys och cellodling*
* God förmåga att kommunicera tydligt i tal och skrift på både svenska och engelska



  





**Meriterande** 



* Erfarenhet av bioassays och cellodling inom läkemedelsindustrin
* Erfarenhet av arbete enligt GMP och/eller GLP



  





**Vem är du?** 




 Vi tror att du är en noggrann och ansvarstagande person som trivs i en strukturerad miljö. Du har ett kvalitetstänk, gillar att samarbeta och är inte rädd för att ta initiativ i ditt arbete.
 



  





**Om uppdraget hos AstraZeneca** 




 Som konsult kommer du arbeta i en verksamhet där kvalitet, innovation och patientsäkerhet står i fokus. Här får du möjlighet att bidra till utveckling och produktion av biologiska läkemedel som når patienter över hela världen.
 



  





**Övrigt** 



* Detta är ett konsultuppdrag via agap2
* Bakgrundskontroll samt alkohol- och drogtest genomförs innan start



  





**Om agap2** 




 agap2 är ett europeiskt ingenjörs- och konsultbolag med fokus på industri, energi, life science och IT. I Sverige är vi i en stark tillväxtfas där vi kombinerar entreprenörsanda med stabiliteten från en internationell koncern. Hos oss får du möjlighet att utvecklas i spännande uppdrag, samtidigt som vi värnar om gemenskap, kvalitet och långsiktighet.

title: Senior Solutions Engineer | Sweden | Remote
description:
Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo).
   

  

 We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do.
   

  

 You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 The Solutions Engineering team are the customer facing product experts. The team enables Grafana Labs worldwide growth by educating potential and existing customers to ensure that they are happy and successful. We share our technical and product expertise with customers through demos, hands on enablement, presentations, technical evaluations and ongoing interaction. We partner closely with our Sales team to help qualify and close opportunities. The Solutions Engineering team is one of the primary routes of communication from our customers to the Product Management and Engineering teams.
   

  

 A Solutions Engineer is able to really listen to a prospect or customer, understand their requirements, ask the right questions to extract as much information as required and translate all that into a solution with Grafana Labs technology. They are the bridge between the highly technical engineering folks here at Grafana Labs, our customers and our Sales team.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing**
* Partnering with our Sales team to articulate the overall Grafana value proposition, vision and strategy to customers
* Owning the technical engagement with customers and help close complex opportunities through advanced competitive knowledge, technical skill and credibility
* Delivering product and technical presentations to potential and existing customers
* Effectively communicate with customers and internal teams to provide feedback on our products and the competitive landscape
* Driving product conversations based on need and problems with customers
* Working with the team to enhance documentation, write blog posts, record videos, contribute knowledge base articles and create other public or private enablement material


**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* 5+ years of technical pre-sales experience
* Be open to various and complex assignments, this will require strong judgment, collaboration, and leadership
* You will need first class written and oral communication skills to collaborate with our remote-first internal teams and with our worldwide customers. You will need to be able to skillfully articulate our value proposition and the technical advantages of our products
* You love solving technical challenges and thrive on bringing creative solutions to our customers
* You should have a technical mindset and a desire to grow technically.
* Must be located in Sweden


**Bonus Points For**
* Experience with Open Source technologies, or in the Metrics/Monitoring space is an advantage
* Experience with sales methodologies like MEDD(P)ICC is a plus


**Compensation & Rewards**
 In Sweden, the OTE (On-Target Earnings) compensation range for this role is SEK 1,119,000 - SEK 1,343,000. Actual compensation may vary based on level, experience, and skillset as assessed throughout the interview process. All of our roles include Restricted Stock Units (RSUs), giving every team member ownership in Grafana Labs' success. We believe in shared outcomes—RSUs help us stay aligned and invested as we scale globally.
   

  

* Compensation ranges are country specific. If you are applying for this role from a different location than listed above, your recruiter will discuss your specific market’s defined pay range & benefits at the beginning of the process.


**Why You’ll Thrive At Grafana Labs**
* 100% Remote, Global Culture - As a remote-only company, we bring together talent from around the world, united by a culture of collaboration and shared purpose.
* Scaling Organization – Tackle meaningful work in a high-growth, ever-evolving environment.
* Transparent Communication – Expect open decision-making and regular company-wide updates.
* Innovation-Driven – Autonomy and support to ship great work and try new things.
* Open Source Roots – Built on community-driven values that shape how we work.
* Empowered Teams – High trust, low ego culture that values outcomes over optics.
* Career Growth Pathways – Defined opportunities to grow and develop your career.
* Approachable Leadership – Transparent execs who are involved, visible, and human.
* Passionate People – Join a team of smart, supportive folks who care deeply about what they do.
* In-Person onboarding - We want you to thrive from day 1 with your fellow new ‘Grafanistas’ to learn all about what we do and how we do it.
* Balance is Key - We operate a global annual leave policy of 30 days per annum. 3 days of your annual leave entitlement are reserved for Grafana Shutdown Days to allow the team to really disconnect. \*We will comply with local legislation where applicable.


**Equal Opportunity Employer:** 
 We will recruit, train, compensate and promote regardless of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, disability, age, veteran status, and all the other fascinating characteristics that make us different and unique. We believe that equality and diversity builds a strong organization and we’re working hard to make sure that’s the foundation of our organization as we grow.
   

  

*Grafana Labs may utilize AI tools in its recruitment process to assist in matching information provided in CVs to job postings. The recruitment team will continue to review inbound CVs manually to identify alignment with current openings.*
*For information about how your personal data is used once you’ve applied to a job, check out our privacy policy.*

title: Front Office Team Member 80%
description:
**Front Office Team Member (80%) – Hilton Stockholm Slussen**
 Hilton Stockholm Slussen is looking for a Front Office Team Member to join the team in a permanent position at 80% (approx.32 hours per week).
   

  

 As part of Hilton—one of the world’s leading hospitality companies with more than 9,000 hotels in over 100 countries—you’ll be part of a global organization with strong opportunities for career development. The hotel overlooks the Old Town and offers 289 guest rooms, extensive meeting facilities, two food & beverage outlets, and an auditorium for events.
   

  

**Do you enjoy creating exceptional guest experiences?**
 You are service-minded, proactive, and thrive in a dynamic environment. You take pride in making guests feel welcome from the moment they arrive.
   

  

 As a Front Office Team Member, you are the face of the hotel—welcoming guests, managing arrivals and departures, and ensuring every stay is smooth, safe, and memorable.
   

  

**To thrive in this role, you:**
* Deliver warm, professional service at check-in, during the stay, and at check-out in line with Hilton standards
* Support guests with questions and requests, providing clear answers and effective solutions
* Assist with luggage during arrivals and departures
* Keep the lobby and front desk area clean, organized, and welcoming
* Follow safety, fire, and security procedures to maintain a safe environment
* Collaborate with Housekeeping, Reservations, and other teams to ensure smooth operations
* Handle administrative tasks such as guest registration, room assignments and payments
* Promote hotel services and amenities to enhance the guest experience
* Stay flexible, positive and calm in a fast-paced environment


**What you bring:**
* A service-oriented, positive, and welcoming approach
* Strong communication skills in Swedish and English
* Ability to multitask and stay calm under pressure
* A team-oriented mindset and willingness to support colleagues across departments
* Experience from Front Office or a similar service role (minimum 3 months)
* Education or studies in hospitality (post-secondary education is an advantage)
* Experience with Opera or similar PMS systems, and confidence using Microsoft Office, is a plus
* Flexibility to work morning, evening, and weekend shifts


**What It’s Like Working At Hilton**
 Our Team Members are at the heart of everything we do. Thrive at Hilton, our global value proposition, supports your wellbeing and career development through industry-leading benefits, recognition programs, and opportunities to grow.
   

  

 Hilton has been recognized as the World’s Best Workplace 2025 by Fortune and Great Place to Work—reflecting our commitment to an inclusive, supportive, and high-performing culture.
   

  

**Additional Information**
 Permanent position at 80% (average 32 hours per week). 6 months probation applies.
   

  

 Covered by the collective agreement between Visita and HRF
   

  

**Work Locations**
 Hilton Stockholm Slussen Hotel
   

  

**Schedule**
 Part-time
   

  

**Brand**
 Hilton Hotels & Resorts
   

  

**Job**
 Guest Services, Operations, and Front Office

title: Cloud Workspace Engineer – IAM & Cloud Platforms
description:
**HAYPP GROUP**
 We address one of the world’s biggest problems – how to end smoking. There are 1,1 billion smokers in the world. Around 8 million people die every year from smoking-related diseases. Our goal is to significantly reduce death rates, save lives and inspire people to choose smoke-free enjoyment. How? By offering people other nicotine products online.
   

  

 Haypp Group is one of the Nordics’ leading e-commerce groups with eleven store brands, present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 million active consumers. Through brands such as Snusbolaget.se, Northerner.com, Nicokick.com etc., we sell nicotine pouches, Swedish style snus online as well as disposable vapes. With our headquarters located on Östgötagatan in Stockholm we are 300 team members mainly but not exclusively based in Sweden. Also, we are an innovative and fast-moving company that is growing rapidly, driving sustainable business and are changing the world in the process. We are currently on an exciting expansion journey, converting more and more smokers to smoke-free alternatives across all our markets globally.
   

  

**THE ROLE**
 At Haypp Group, we’re evolving our IT environment to be smarter, faster, and more secure across multiple cloud platforms. We’re looking for a Cloud Engineer with strong IAM knowledge to help us build, manage, and improve secure cloud solutions across Microsoft Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud Platform.
   

  

 This role is ideal for someone who combines solid cloud engineering experience with a strong understanding of Identity and Access Management, federation, and cloud security. You will play a key role in strengthening our multicloud environment, improving secure access across platforms, and helping us build scalable and future-ready ways of working.
   

  

**WHAT YOU'LL DO:**
 As a Cloud Engineer at Haypp Group, you will work hands-on with our cloud platforms and identity landscape. You will:
   

  

* Design, build, and maintain secure cloud solutions across Azure, AWS, and GCP
* Strengthen our IAM and identity provider strategy, especially around integrating Entra ID with AWS and GCP for SSO, MFA, and unified access
* Implement and improve identity federation, access governance, and role-based / least-privilege access models across cloud platforms
* Manage and improve access for users, groups, applications, and workloads across internal and third-party services
* Drive cloud and IT projects that improve scalability, compliance, resilience, and security
* Automate repetitive tasks and cloud workflows using tools such as PowerShell, Python, Bash, Terraform, or similar
* Partner with internal stakeholders to integrate new SaaS applications and cloud services with secure authentication and access controls
* Maintain and improve documentation, operational routines, troubleshooting guides, and disaster recovery playbooks
* Monitor cloud environments, support audits, and help implement best practices for security, compliance, and operational excellence


**WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:**
 We’re looking for someone with strong hands-on cloud engineering experience and a clear understanding of IAM in modern cloud environments. We believe you have experience with:
   

  

* Azure, AWS, and/or Google Cloud Platform, ideally with solid exposure to at least two of them
* IAM, SSO, MFA, and federation across cloud platforms
* Entra ID / Azure AD, AWS IAM, and ideally Google Cloud IAM
* Identity and authentication protocols such as SAML, OAuth2, and OpenID Connect
* Integrating cloud platforms and SaaS applications with central identity providers
* Scripting and automation for provisioning, reporting, and operational improvements
* Working with cloud security principles such as least privilege, conditional access, and Zero Trust
* Communicating clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders


**It’s a plus if you also have experience with:**
* Terraform or other infrastructure-as-code tools
* Workload identity and service-to-service authentication
* IT service management and asset management in multicloud environments
* Compliance or security frameworks such as ISO 27001, NIST, GDPR, NIS2, or DORA
* Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, SharePoint, or similar workplace platforms
* Relevant certifications in Azure, AWS, GCP, or Microsoft 365


**Examples of projects you may work on:**
* Integrating Entra ID with AWS and GCP to create a more seamless and secure access model
* Improving SSO and MFA across business-critical internal and third-party applications
* Migrating legacy systems and services into a more modern, cloud-first setup
* Rolling out stronger Zero Trust principles across our cloud environment
* Automating user lifecycle, access provisioning, and compliance reporting
* Supporting secure onboarding of new SaaS tools and business applications
* Improving disaster recovery and cloud resilience across multiple platforms


**YOU WILL THRIVE HERE IF YOU:**
 We’re looking for someone who:
   

  

* Takes ownership and enjoys solving real business and technical challenges
* Has a strong quality and security mindset
* Is proactive and enjoys improving processes through automation
* Likes collaborating across teams and building trust with stakeholders
* Is curious and keeps up with modern cloud, IAM, and security practices
* Can balance hands-on delivery with long-term thinking


**What We Offer**
 We are a value driven company with our values
 *We team up* 
 ,
 *Innovation Drives Us* 
 ,
 *Inclusion and Non-Hierarchy* 
 and
 *Going the Extra Mile* 
 at the heartbeat of everything that we do. With us you can always expect to get help from people who want to achieve things together and to be able to speak your mind in every social constellation you are part of. We highly value all ideas no matter where they come from, and we are not afraid to try new things out. We are also welcoming, inclusive and everyone at Haypp Group has a voice. In addition, we seize opportunities by putting in hands-on, hard work and celebrating when we reach our goals. With us, you should always feel safe, appreciated and valued but at the same time challenged and excited.
   

  

 Because we recognize that our team members are our most important differentiator, we offer our team members generous benefits. We offer the following perks to everyone at Haypp Group:
   

  

* Competitive occupational pension
* Insurance plan, including private healthcare
* 30 days of paid vacation
* Parental pay lift
* Wellness allowance of 5,000 SEK per year
* Lots of social happenings


**SEND US YOUR APPLICATION TODAY!**
 If this sounds like a place where you would want to contribute and grow, let us know you’re interested by submitting your application!
   

  

 Haypp Group is committed to equality and diversity, and we welcome applications from all qualified individuals regardless of ethnicity, religion, age, gender, sexual orientation, disability, and marital status. We want to offer you great recruitment experience, and if there is anything we can do to make you more comfortable in the process with us, please let us know.
   

  

 If you have any questions about the role or what it’s like to work at Haypp Group in general, feel free to reach out to our responsible recruiter Lea Sjösten at lea.sjosten@hayppgroup.com. We look forward to hearing from you!
   

  

 The Haypp Group is spearheading the global transformation from smoking to healthier product alternatives. With origins in Scandinavia our extensive experience from pioneering markets in smoke free alternatives, as well as being a leader in the e-commerce sector, we now fully bring our vision to a global scale.
   

  

 With 11 e-commerce brands, the Haypp Group is present in seven countries where we serve more than 1 100 000 consumers.

title: Business Operations Senior Manager - Workplace Strategy
description:
**Craft:**
 HR & Business Support
   

  

**Job Description:**
**Summary**
 The Senior Manager, Workplace Strategy is responsible for ensuring stable global operations across all six of King’s offices. This role will also lead the development of King’s global workplace strategy that supports our business goals and employee needs.
   

  

 This role will be both hands‑on and strategic, with an emphasis on establishing operational efficiency and then translating those insights into a global workplace strategy.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Establish clear processes, policies and guidelines for the workplace
* Lead and manage workplace partner (Sodexo) to consistently improve for optimal efficiency
* Manage relationship and scope of work with workplace partner (Sodexo), inclusive of attending operational, financial and account meetings
* In partnership with Director, Global Workspace Design & Construction, ensure that all physical space projects are successfully delivered
* Own and track (in partnership with Finance) the annual workplace budget
* Data monitoring and analysis to understand space utilization (ie. Office usage stats)
* Establish and own global workplace strategy for King and lead implementation of strategy through initiatives and projects with the workplace team
* Continuous market research and analysis for workplace set up and experience
* Key partner in setting, tracking and forecasting workplace budgets


**Scope of work**
* Ownership and management of workplace operations, for example:
+ IFM supplier contract and management
+ Real estate contracts – lease and renewals
+ Maintaining office floor maps and office utilization statistics
+ Maintaining office rules and policies (inclusive of mobile phones)
+ Support Project Coordinator in ongoing workplace projects


* Drive workplace optimisation projects, for example:
+ Office moves and restacks
+ Office subleases
+ Visitor system
+ Employee Parking
+ Christmas hampers
+ Work policy changes that impact our offices


* Act as key contributor for workplace related support needs, for example:
+ Events and materials from Event team, Executive Assistants, IT and other stakeholders
+ Provide the Director of Design & Construction with insights, suggestions and support with implementation of projects


**About King**
 With a mission of
 *Making the World Playful* 
 , King is a leading interactive entertainment company with more than 20 years of history of delivering some of the world’s most iconic games in the mobile gaming industry, including the world-famous Candy Crush franchise, as well as other mobile game hits such as
 *Farm Heroes Sag* 
 a. King games are played by more than 200 million monthly active users. King, part of Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT), has Kingsters in Stockholm, Malmö, London, Barcelona, Berlin, Dublin, San Francisco, New York, Los Angeles and Malta. More information can be found at King.com or by following us on LinkedIn, @lifeatking on Instagram, or @king\_games on X.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description:
**WHO WE ARE** 





 At Trustly, we're building a smarter, faster, and more secure financial future by revolutionizing the world of payments. As a global leader in Open Banking Payments, we are establishing Pay by Bank as the new standard at checkout, providing unparalleled freedom, speed, and ease to millions of consumers and merchants worldwide.
 




  






 Our Ambition: To build the world’s most disruptive payment network and redefine what the payment experience should feel like.
 




  






 Trustly is a global team of innovators, collaborators, and doers.  If you are driven by a strong sense of purpose and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial, and high-growth environment, join us and be part of a team that’s transforming the way the world pays.
 




  





 About The Role
 


  



 We are looking for an all-star Frontend Engineer with strong Typescript experience to join our team in Stockholm, Sweden. You’ll primarily be working on improving the Checkout experience for millions of customers across Europe. You are a frontend developer by heart, who is eager to take responsibility and drive things end-to-end.
 



  


  
 


  


 About The Payment Experience Team
 


  



 The Payment Experience team manages the paying and deposit product at Trustly, which is one of our core offerings. The team is a mix of frontend and backend engineers, working closely with UX and neighbouring teams. On a daily basis, the team focuses on improving existing product flows and managing new or changing integrations, with the aim to create the highest converting payment product on the market.
 





  




**What you'll do** 
  
* Be a part of our payment team and build the UI for the next-generation payment platform using
 **React**
  
* Learn new methods and techniques in a team where
 **pair and mob programming** 
 is part of the daily methodology
  
* Work closely with other developers, UX Designers, and product owners on a daily basis
  
* Maintain a high focus on writing clean, testable code
  
* Analyze large volumes of data to find possible problems and propose performance improvements
  
* Identify performance issues and propose solutions
  
* Support new developers on the company and train them on the development process, patterns, and features
  
* Participate in functional meetings with non-engineering teams, offering knowledge of all front-end features and skills to propose solutions
  
* Be able to participate in incident meetings and create an action plan
  
* Drive technical initiatives from ideation to completion, influencing how your team collaborates and ships code
  
* Design, develop, test, deploy, maintain, and improve software; take full responsibility for the lifecycle of your code
  

  



  




**Who you are** 
  
* Expert understanding and deep practical knowledge of state management, API integration, and frontend testing frameworks, ensuring robust and maintainable code
  
* Highly skilled in JavaScript/TypeScript, including ES6+ features, asynchronous operations, and contemporary web development methodologies
  
* Significant practical experience with current web frameworks such as React
  
* Demonstrated success in building fast, high-performance web applications, with a focus on speed optimisation, adherence to accessibility standards (WCAG), and reliable cross-browser functionality
  
* Familiarity with CI/CD (Continuous Integration/Continuous Delivery) practices
  
* Familiar with using AI-tools in software development
  
* Ability to navigate across the entire technology stack, not limited to the frontend scope
  
* Strong communication skills and fluency in English
  

  


  

  
   

 Also nice if you have
   

  
* Experience in mobile app development, specifically covering both iOS and Android platforms
  
* Knowledge of infrastructure orchestration using Kubernetes and Istio for traffic flow management
  
* Proficient in application monitoring, leveraging tools like Datadog for system reliability
  
* Experience of Java for building scalable and maintainable backend services
  
* Expertise in end-to-end testing methodologies, utilising modern frameworks like Playwright
  
* Familiarity with deployment control, specifically using feature flag tools like ConfigCat
  
* Interest in User Experience (UX), ensuring technical deliverables align with design principles
  
* Proven ability to manage merchant integrations and provide direct technical customer support
  
* Responsible and proactive in driving things end-to-end and a willingness to act as a cross-team bridge between different teams and systems
  
* A collaborative spirit, as you will be one of a small number of Front-end developers - it is important that we do not work in a silo
  

  






  




  


**Our Fantastic Benefits**

 (varies by location)
 




 🌴
 **20 to 30 days of holiday** 
 to support a healthy work-life balance
 



 🥳
 **Monthly team outing allowance** 
 to enjoy social events with your colleagues
 



 👶
 **Parental leave top-up** 
 additional support for new parents
 



 🥐
 **Daily breakfast and on-site perks** 
 to make your workday smoother
 



 💚
 **Well being support** 
 our health allowance covers gym memberships, massages, and much more to help you feel your best
 



**PLUS** 
 additional benefits designed to enhance your work-life experience!
 



  





**Shape Your Role and Make an Impact**




 Join a dynamic environment where you can take ownership, drive change, and continuously embrace new challenges. We’re looking for dedicated and highly motivated individuals who thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy collaborating across different areas of the organisation.
 



 If your skills and experience align with this role, we’d love to hear from you!
 **Apply now and submit your CV in English.** 



  


 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: GRC Specialist II
description:
**ABOUT SINCH** 




 Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 150,000 businesses - including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others - rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 



 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 



 At Sinch we "Dream Big", "Win Together", "Keep it simple", and "Make it Happen". These values are our foundation!
   

  

**DESCRIPTION** 




 Sinch is looking for a Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC) Specialist II to help strengthen and evolve our GRC function. You'll work on building and maintaining our cybersecurity program, running risk assessments, reviewing vendors as part of our third-party risk management process, and supporting compliance efforts like SOC 2 and ISO certifications.
 



 We're seeking someone who's curious, proactive, and comfortable working independently. An understanding of communications platforms (email, SMS, voice) is a plus. A genuine interest in risk and compliance will take you far in this role.
 


* Build and run an information risk program, including identifying, assessing, tracking, and remediating risks with business owners
* Partner across Sinch to surface enterprise risks and identify control gaps
* Lead audits and certifications (ISO 27001, ISO 27701, SOC 2 Type I & II), coordinating with auditors and stakeholders to ensure smooth execution
* Develop and improve internal controls, including access reviews and third-party risk management, and evaluate vendors against security standards
* Share key audit findings with stakeholders and leadership
* Review business processes and maintain clear policies and documentation to support compliance and efficiency
* Promote awareness of compliance and information security across the organization
* Act as a trusted partner in strengthening Sinch's security posture



**REQUIREMENTS** 



* 5+ years of experience in information security
* Degree in Information Security, IT, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience
* Relevant certifications such as Security+, Network+, Project+, CRISC, or CISA are a plus
* Strong willingness to learn and ability to work independently



 Our corporate language is English, please submit your application in
 **English.** 




 At Sinch, we value learning, embrace change, and offer opportunities for personal and professional growth. Unfortunately, we are not supporting relocation at this time.
 



 Applicants must:
 


* Hold Swedish or EU/EEA citizenship.
* Have a valid Swedish work permit.



**OUR HIRING PROCESS** 




 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 



 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager
description:
Att välja Capgemini innebär att välja en arbetsplats där du ges möjlighet att forma din karriär på det sätt du själv önskar, där du ingår i en stödjande och inspirerande gemenskap med engagerade kollegor världen över, och där du får chansen att omdefiniera vad som är möjligt. Våra Cloud & Custom applications-team fokuserar på att utveckla skräddarsydda cloudapplikationer, integrera IT-system och driva affärstransformation, med leverans av affärskritiska cloudlösningar i hög kvalitet och hastighet, möjliggjort av Generative AI. Bli en del av oss och hjälp världsledande organisationer att frigöra teknikens värde och bygga en mer hållbar och inkluderande framtid!
   

  

****Om rollen****
 Vill du förändra världen? Vi söker en Senior Cloud Architect & People Manager för AWS och/eller GCP, som kommer vara en nyckelperson i att utföra molntransformationer inom AWS / GCP, driva strategiska initiativ på nordisk nivå, vara rådgivare åt CXOs, och bygga högpresterande team. Du kommer ha möjlighet att delta i molnkonferenser, bidra till pre-sales och bygga nätverk med partners som Amazon, Microsoft och Google.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du behöva stödja kunder med molnarkitektur, kunna stödja team i att utföra implementationer av din vision, och successivt ta större ledaransvar för ett växande team. Du kommer ha ansvar som people manager där du kommer vara chef, ha personalansvar, ansvara för rekryteringsmål, och stödja kollegor.
   

  

*I den här rollen kommer du att ha en nyckelroll i:*
* Driva strategi och initiativ inom cloud på nordisk nivå.
* Hjälpa våra kunder med molnarkitektur och cloud native lösningar.
* Använda dig utav generativ och agentisk AI.


*S* 
*om People Manager kommer du att:*
* Personalansvar för ett växande team.
* Ansvara för att sätta riktningen för teamets utveckling, driva affärsutveckling och bidra till tillväxt. Rekrytering och kompetensutveckling är en naturlig del av din vardag.
* Ha fokus på dina teammedlemmars individuella karriärutveckling. Genom regelbundna one-on-one-samtal hjälper du dina konsulter att planera sina karriärer och nå sina mål.
* Du kommer att arbeta nära försäljnings- och leveransteam, andra chefer för att säkerställa att vi levererar högsta värde till våra kunder.


**Din profil**
* Minst 6 års erfarenhet och mycket goda kunskaper av implementation med molntjänster som AWS eller GCP.
* Minst 3 år som molnarkitekt och ansvarig för att sätta upp molnarkitektur, gärna med kunskaper om Amazons tolkning utav CAF, WAF, COM och OCA.
* Kunskap i ett eller flera programmeringsspråk, t.ex. Python, Java, Kotlin, Golang eller Node.
* Intresse för DevSecOps, generativ AI, agentisk AI och cloud-native lösningar.
* En naturlig ledare som vill utveckla andra. Väldigt positivt om du har tidigare erfarenhet med personalansvar.
* Flytande svenska och engelska kunskaper, i både tal och skrift.


**Vad vi tror kommer få dig att trivas**
* Arbeta med de senaste teknologierna och påverka på nordisk nivå. Du samarbetar med andra specialister, kompetensväxlar och bidrar till att bygga AWS-kapabilitet i Norden – samtidigt som du påverkar några av världens största bolag.
* Utvecklas genom utbildningar, certifieringar och interna initiativ- Du får tillgång till utbildningar och certifieringar inom AI och AWS samt möjlighet att engagera dig i Capgeminis fokusområden som Diversity & Inclusion, Sustainability, Wellness Club och Art Club.
* Njut av en engagerande arbetsplats med starkt stöd och förmåner. Vi erbjuder friskvårdsbidrag, tjänstepension, bonusprogram, företagshälsovård och sjukvårdsförsäkring – samt en inkluderande kontorskultur med sociala aktiviteter och teambuilding.


**Ansökan**
 Redo att ta din karriär till nästa nivå? Ansök nu och bli en del av Capgemini Sveriges innovativa AWS-team! Ansök redan idag – vi hanterar ansökningarna löpande. Under processen får du chansen att kika in på vårt kontor, prata med vår rekryterande chef och självklart ställa alla dina nyfikna frågor till vår rekryterare. Varmt välkommen in med din ansökan!
   

  

*Som en del av vår rekryteringsprocess kommer identitetskontroll att genomföras genom granskning av ditt ID-kort, och bakgrundskontroller kan utföras vid behov.*
**Om Capgemini**
 Capgemini är en AI-driven global partner för affärs- och tekniktransformation som levererar konkret verksamhetsnytta. Vi formar framtiden för organisationer och förverkligar den med hjälp av AI, teknik och människor. Med vår starka historia på nästan 60 år är vi en ansvarsfull och mångsidig koncern med över 420 000 medarbetare i över 50 länder. Genom vår expertis inom strategi, teknik, design, ingenjörstjänster och affärsverksamhet levererar vi heltäckande tjänster och lösningar, baserade på vår djupa branschkunskap och vårt omfattande partnernätverk. Koncernen rapporterade globala intäkter på 22,5 miljarder euro för 2025.
   

  

**Make it real** 
 | www.capgemini.com

title: Manager of Solution Architecture & Programme Management
description:
At Quinyx, we don’t just build software; we transform the everyday lives of the frontline workforce. As our platform scales globally, we are looking for a visionary leader who can seamlessly blend solution architecture, programme delivery, and customer transformation into one high-performing engine.
   

  

****🎯** 
**About the role****
 As our new Manager of Solution Architecture & Programme Management, you won't just oversee Implementation projects, but design the blueprint for how our enterprise customers realise value. Sitting right at the intersection of technology, commercial strategy, and delivery excellence, you will partner closely with Sales, Product, and Engineering to land strategic deals and continuously elevate our SaaS implementations. If you thrive in a fast-paced scale-up environment, love empowering teams, and are eager to leverage AI and fresh methodologies to drive innovation, this is your stage.
   

  

****📝** 
**What you’ll do****
 You will step into a high-impact role where your leadership directly influences our product, our sales, and ultimately, our customers' success. You'll be the driving force behind modern, at-scale SaaS implementations, proving that true customer transformation is achieved through a mix of brilliant tech and delivery excellence.
   

  

**Your Core Focus Will Span Across The Following Areas**
**Team Leadership**
* Empower and elevate: Be the leader your team deserves. You will coach, mentor, and build structured growth paths for a brilliant group of Solution Architects and Programme Managers.
* Shape the culture: Cultivate a collaborative, high-energy environment where delivering immense customer value and sharing knowledge across the business is second nature.
* Drive performance: Translate broader company OKRs into clear, actionable priorities and KPIs that keep your team focused, motivated, and successful.


**Programme & Delivery Excellence**
* Set the gold standard: You are the ultimate guardian of delivery success. You'll ensure our enterprise projects consistently hit the mark on quality, budget, and timelines using best-in-class methodologies.
* Executive sponsorship: Step in as the Project Sponsor for major Solution Design workstreams, offering strategic oversight, auditing, and escalation support when it matters most.
* Data-driven leadership: Keep a pulse on team performance and project health, providing transparent metrics on customer satisfaction and delivery quality to the wider leadership team.


**Solution Design, Transformation & Value Realisation**
* Architect for impact: Own and refine our Solution Design frameworks, ensuring that every implementation we do is scalable, consistent, and built for the future.
* Prove the value: Move beyond just "going live." You will build frameworks that clearly track and communicate the ROI our customers achieve throughout their journey with us.
* Guide the change: Act as a strategic advisor for our customers, helping them navigate organisational change and ensuring our platform creates meaningful, lasting business impact.


**Process, Methodology & Innovation**
* Never stand still: Constantly iterate on our delivery methodologies to ensure they remain efficient, scalable, and perfectly tailored to a hyper-growth SaaS environment.
* Automate and innovate: Pioneer the use of AI-driven tools and automation to strip away busywork, allowing your team to deliver faster time-to-value without ever compromising on quality.
* Scale the knowledge: Break down silos. You will build standardised playbooks and foster cross-regional collaboration to ensure our best ideas are shared globally.


**Business Impact & Commercial Contribution**
* Bridge tech and revenue: Foster a strong commercial mindset within your team to spot upsell opportunities, expand project scopes, and drive new ARR through strategic solution positioning.
* Win together: Partner closely with Sales and Sales Engineering to architect winning solutions for complex, high-stakes enterprise deals.
* Influence the product: Act as the crucial feedback loop between the frontline and HQ, sharing implementation insights, market gaps, and innovation opportunities directly with Product and Engineering leadership.


****✅** 
**What we’re looking for****
* Extensive experience in implementation, consulting, programme delivery, or solution architecture within a tech or SaaS environment.
* Proven experience from leading and growing senior customer-facing technical professionals, such as Solution Architects, consultants, or Programme Managers.
* Experience working in a high-growth SaaS or scale-up environment.
* Strong track record delivering complex enterprise implementations or architecture engagements.
* Demonstrated ability to lead and develop high-performing teams and drive cross-functional collaboration.
* Understanding of modern SaaS architectures, integrations, and APIs.
* Familiarity with AI concepts and data-driven solutions, with interest in applying emerging technologies to improve delivery efficiency.


**💡** 
**Desired personality traits**
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to influence across teams and leadership levels.
* A proactive mindset and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced, evolving environment.


****💙 Why Quinyx?****
 Quinyx Is a Leading Workforce Management Platform, Helping Businesses Simplify Scheduling, Optimise Staffing, And Engage Their Frontline Teams. We Empower Organisations Across The Globe, Ranging From Retail And Hospitality To Logistics And Healthcare, With Smart, Mobile-first Solutions. Here, You’ll Find
   

  

* A truly international team with colleagues from all over the world
* A flexible and hybrid-friendly work culture
* Opportunities to grow, take ownership, and make a real impact
* An open, inclusive, and fun environment where your ideas matter


****🎁 What we offer****
* Flexible work hours and a hybrid setup with at least 2 days from the office.
* Enhanced vacation allowance, gym membership contribution, health insurance and a pension plan.
* On-market pay.


****📬 How to apply & Our process****
 Ready To Join The Team? Submit Your Application Below, And We’ll Be In Touch As Soon As Possible. We’re Excited To Hear From You! What Our Hiring Process Looks Like
   

  

* Fill out a short application.
* Get invited to complete our psychometric and objective assessments through Alva Labs.
* Screening call with our Talent team.
* Meet the hiring manager.
* Complete a role-specific assessment (technical questions or case).
* Final interview (in-office).
* Offer, references & background checks.


****🙌 Quinyx is an equal opportunity employer****
 We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees - no matter your background, identity, or experience.
   

  

*****When work just works***
***!*****

title: Manager, Enterprise Solutions - Stockholm | BCG Platinion
description:
Who We Are
   

  

 Do you want to turn the challenges of digitalization into the solutions of the future? Join BCG Platinion in tackling the core IT issues of leading global companies!
   

  

 Deploy customized platforms, architectures, strategies, and organizations to leverage the digital potential of our customers and drive true innovation, with state-of-the-art tools such as cloud computing, AI, blockchain, microservices, and containerization. Add your individual strengths to our unique team, always there to support you. Together with Boston Consulting Group and our clients, we turn digital visions into reality.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

 For our Stockholm office, we are looking for Managers for our Enterprise Solutions chapter!
   

  

 At BCG Platinion, we provide sound advice on all relevant IT issues. In particular, the migration to the SAP S/4HANA solution against the background of the planned mainstream maintenance presents our customers with special challenges. The typical questions our customers have range from justification and business benefits of the SAP S/4 HANA Transition to optimized roadmaps taking into account the implications on overall architecture and also alternative solutions and platforms.
   

  

 To serve our customers even better, we would like to strengthen our Enterprise Solutions team. You work together with colleagues from Platinion and/or the Boston Consulting Group on local and international customer projects. Together with our customers, you actively develop superior, business value driven ERP and application architecture strategies, concepts and roadmaps and apply your sound technical and process-related understanding.
